TL;DR: DynaSlide是一个用于动态幻灯片更新的基准数据集，SlideAgent是基于代理的框架，能够在保持布局和样式的同时根据自然语言指令更新用户提供的模板幻灯片。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动化方法大多遵循固定模板填充，无法支持用户自定义幻灯片模板的动态更新。数据驱动的报告幻灯片更新仍然劳动密集，需要更灵活的解决方案。

Method: 提出了SlideAgent框架，结合多模态幻灯片解析、自然语言指令理解和工具增强推理（用于表格、图表和文本结论）。该框架在保持布局和样式的同时更新内容。

Result: 创建了DynaSlide基准数据集，包含20,036个真实世界的指令-执行三元组。SlideAgent在该基准上提供了强大的参考基线，并通过评估协议揭示了关键挑战和未来研究方向。

Conclusion: DynaSlide基准和SlideAgent框架为动态幻灯片更新任务提供了重要资源，展示了基于代理的方法在保持布局和样式的同时更新用户自定义模板的潜力。

Abstract: Presentation slides are a primary medium for data-driven reporting, yet keeping complex, analytics-style decks up to date remains labor-intensive. Existing automation methods mostly follow fixed template filling and cannot support dynamic updates for diverse, user-authored slide decks. We therefore define "Dynamic Slide Update via Natural Language Instructions on User-provided Templates" and introduce DynaSlide, a large-scale benchmark with 20,036 real-world instruction-execution triples (source slide, user instruction, target slide) grounded in a shared external database and built from business reporting slides under bring-your-own-template (BYO-template) conditions. To tackle this task, we propose SlideAgent, an agent-based framework that combines multimodal slide parsing, natural language instruction grounding, and tool-augmented reasoning for tables, charts, and textual conclusions. SlideAgent updates content while preserving layout and style, providing a strong reference baseline on DynaSlide. We further design end-to-end and component-level evaluation protocols that reveal key challenges and opportunities for future research. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/XiaoZhou2024/SlideAgent.

</details>


### [417] [Heterogeneity in Formal Linguistic Competence of Language Models: Is Data the Real Bottleneck?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17930)
*H S V N S Kowndinya Renduchintala,Sumit Bhatia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过向预训练数据中注入少量（1%）针对特定语言现象的人工合成数据，可以显著提升小语言模型在原本表现不佳的语法任务上的性能，表明数据组成而非架构限制是影响模型语言能力的关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型在形式语言能力上表现差异的原因：为什么模型在某些语言现象上表现近乎完美，而在其他现象上却低于随机水平？这种失败是由于固有的架构限制，还是因为网络规模语料库中特定语法结构的稀缺性？

Method: 在FineWeb语料库的1亿token随机样本上预训练GPT-2 Small模型，然后通过注入少量（1%）针对特定语言现象的合成数据进行干预。使用BLiMP基准测试评估模型在9个表现最差的语言范式上的性能变化。

Result: 目标干预显著改善了9个最差表现范式中的8个，其中only_npi_scope范式的准确率从20.9%大幅提升至69.4%。干预总体上保持或略微改善了聚合性能。但发现了一个抵抗现象principle_A_c_command，即使在数据增强后表现仍低于随机水平。

Conclusion: 即使小语言模型也能在通常表现不佳的语言现象上显著改进，前提是预训练数据包含足够的暴露。这表明数据组成而非架构限制是关键因素，人类规模的语言建模工作可能通过关注数据组成而大大受益。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit a puzzling disparity in their formal linguistic competence: while they learn some linguistic phenomena with near-perfect mastery, they often perform below chance on others, even after training on trillions of tokens. In this work, we investigate whether these failures stem from inherent architectural limitations or simply the scarcity of these specific grammatical constructions in web-scale corpora. We pre-train simple GPT-2 Small (124M) models on a 100M-token random sample of the FineWeb corpus and intervene by injecting a minimal amount (1%) of synthetic data targeting specific linguistic phenomena. We find that this targeted intervention substantially improves model performance in 8 out of the 9 worst-performing BLiMP paradigms - notably the accuracy on a specific paradigm, only_npi_scope, surges from 20.9% to 69.4%. Furthermore, we observe that these interventions generally preserve or slightly improve aggregate performance. However, while we also identify a resistant phenomenon, principle_A_c_command, whose performance remains below chance even after our data augmentation, our findings do serve as an optimistic existence proof that even small language models can substantially improve on those linguistic phenomena on which models typically perform poorly, provided the pre-training data contains sufficient exposure to them. This suggests that efforts towards human-scale language modeling may benefit greatly by focusing on data composition. The code to reproduce our results is open-sourced at https://github.com/kowndinya-renduchintala/heterogeneity-in-formal-linguistic-competence.

</details>


### [418] [Domain-oriented RAG Assessment (DoRA): Synthetic Benchmarking for RAG-based Question Answering on Defense Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17943)
*Bao Gia Doan,Aditya Joshi,Pantelis Elinas,Aarya Bodhankar,Oscar Leslie,Tom Marchant,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DoRA是一个面向领域的RAG评估基准，基于国防文档构建，包含6.5K个合成QA实例，支持可审计的证据归因，用于评估RAG系统在领域转移下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放域RAG基准可能高估实际部署性能，因为存在预训练数据重叠和弱归因要求的问题。需要构建领域基础的基准来评估RAG在真实场景下的表现。

Method: 从国防文档构建DoRA基准，包含合成、意图条件的QA对和可审计的证据段落。涵盖五种问题类型（查找、解释、总结、生成、提供），共6.5K个精心策划的实例。

Result: 在固定密集检索器的端到端评估中，通用语言模型表现相似，而在DoRA上训练的模型（DoRA SFT）相比基础模型（Llama3.1-8B-Instruct）有显著提升：QA任务成功率提高达26%，RAG忠实度评分中的幻觉率降低47%。

Conclusion: DoRA支持在领域转移下进行污染感知的回归测试，表明领域特定的训练可以显著提升RAG系统的性能和忠实度。

Abstract: Open-domain RAG benchmarks over public corpora can overestimate deployment performance due to pretraining overlap and weak attribution requirements. We present DoRA (Domain-oriented RAG Assessment), a domain-grounded benchmark built from defense documents that pairs synthetic, intent-conditioned QA (question answering) with auditable evidence passages for attribution. DoRA covers five question types (find, explain, summarize, generate, provide) and contains 6.5K curated instances. In end-to-end evaluation with a fixed dense retriever, general-purpose Language Models (LMs) perform similarly, while a model trained on DoRA (DoRA SFT) yields large gains over the base model (Llama3.1-8B-Instruct): up to 26% improvement in QA task success, while reducing the hallucination rate by 47% in RAG faithfulness scores, supporting contamination-aware regression testing under domain shift.

</details>


### [419] [ReCoQA: A Benchmark for Tool-Augmented and Multi-Step Reasoning in Real Estate Question and Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17944)
*Yindong Zhang,Wenmian Yang,Yiquan Zhang,Weijia Jia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了ReCoQA基准测试和HIRE-Agent分层框架，用于解决多源信息整合的智能体导航问题，特别针对房地产领域的混合工作流（数据库查询+外部API调用）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体在处理碎片化、多源信息时面临挑战，主要原因是缺乏反映混合工作流（结合数据库查询和外部API调用）的基准测试。需要建立能够评估智能体整合异构信息能力的标准。

Method: 1) 提出ReCoQA基准：包含29,270个房地产实例，提供机器可验证的中间步骤监督（结构化意图标签、SQL查询、API调用）。2) 提出HIRE-Agent分层框架：基于理解-规划-执行架构，包含前端解析器、规划监督器和执行专家，有效整合异构证据。

Result: 大量实验证明HIRE-Agent构成了强大的基线，验证了分层协作对于复杂现实世界推理任务的必要性。该框架能够有效整合异构证据，在ReCoQA基准上表现良好。

Conclusion: ReCoQA基准填补了混合工作流评估的空白，HIRE-Agent分层框架为解决复杂多源信息整合问题提供了有效方案，强调了分层协作在现实世界推理任务中的重要性。

Abstract: Developing agents capable of navigating fragmented, multi-source information remains challenging, primarily due to the scarcity of benchmarks reflecting hybrid workflows combining database querying with external APIs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReCoQA, a large-scale benchmark of 29,270 real-estate instances featuring machine-verifiable supervision for intermediate steps, including structured intent labels, SQL queries, and API calls. Complementarily, we propose HIRE-Agent, a hierarchical framework instantiating an understand-plan-execute architecture as a strong baseline. By orchestrating a Front-end parser, a planning Supervisor, and execution Specialists, HIRE-Agent effectively integrates heterogeneous evidence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HIRE-Agent constitutes a strong baseline and substantiates the necessity of hierarchical collaboration for complex, real-world reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [420] [Process Reward Models Meet Planning: Generating Precise and Scalable Datasets for Step-Level Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17957)
*Raffaele Pisano,Roberto Navigli*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于PDDL规划问题生成PRM训练数据的新方法，可大规模生成约100万个推理步骤，显著提升了PRM在数学和非数学推理任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PRM数据集构建成本高、易出现标注错误，且主要局限于数学领域，需要一种可扩展的方法来生成更广泛、更精确的训练数据。

Method: 使用规划领域定义语言（PDDL）表达的逻辑规划问题来生成PRM数据集，通过这种方法生成了跨多个PDDL领域的大约100万个推理步骤。

Result: 在广泛使用的PRM训练数据集中加入PDDL生成的数据后，在多个基准测试中，数学和非数学推理能力都得到了显著提升。

Conclusion: 规划问题构成了一个可扩展且有效的资源，可用于生成PRM的鲁棒、精确和细粒度训练数据，超越了该领域传统的数学数据源。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for providing step-level feedback when evaluating the reasoning of Large Language Models (LLMs), which frequently produce chains of thought (CoTs) containing errors even when the final answer is correct. However, existing PRM datasets remain expensive to construct, prone to annotation errors, and predominantly limited to the mathematical domain. This work introduces a novel and scalable approach to PRM dataset generation based on planning logical problems expressed in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL). Using this method, we generate a corpus of approximately one million reasoning steps across various PDDL domains and use it to train PRMs. Experimental results show that augmenting widely-used PRM training datasets with PDDL-derived data yields substantial improvements in both mathematical and non-mathematical reasoning, as demonstrated across multiple benchmarks. These findings indicate that planning problems constitute a scalable and effective resource for generating robust, precise, and fine-grained training data for PRMs, going beyond the classical mathematical sources that dominate this field.

</details>


### [421] [Modeling Multiple Support Strategies within a Single Turn for Emotional Support Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17972)
*Jie Zhu,Huaixia Dou,Junhui Li,Lifan Guo,Feng Chen,Jinsong Su,Chi Zhang,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文重新定义了情感支持对话任务，将单轮对话支持视为多策略生成问题，提出了两种生成方法并通过强化学习增强认知推理，实验证明多策略方法能提升支持质量和对话成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感支持对话研究通常假设每个支持者轮次只对应单一策略，但现实中的支持性沟通往往在单个话语中包含多个策略。为了更贴近真实场景，需要重新审视ESC任务，将其建模为多策略话语生成问题。

Method: 提出了两种多策略话语生成方法：1）All-in-One：在单个解码步骤中预测所有策略-响应对；2）One-by-One：迭代生成策略-响应对直到完成。两种方法都通过强化学习引导的认知推理来增强策略选择和响应组合。

Result: 在ESConv数据集上的实验结果表明，所提方法能有效建模多策略话语，在话语级和对话级设置下均能提升支持质量和对话成功率。这是首个系统性的实证证据，证明在单个话语中允许多个支持策略对情感支持对话既可行又有益。

Conclusion: 多策略话语生成是情感支持对话的有效方法，能更好地模拟真实支持性沟通。提出的两种生成框架结合认知推理强化学习，为ESC任务提供了新的研究方向。所有代码和数据将公开。

Abstract: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to assist individuals experiencing distress by generating empathetic and supportive dialogue. While prior work typically assumes that each supporter turn corresponds to a single strategy, real-world supportive communication often involves multiple strategies within a single utterance. In this paper, we revisit the ESC task by formulating it as multi-strategy utterance generation, where each utterance may contain one or more strategy-response pairs. We propose two generation methods: All-in-One, which predicts all strategy-response pairs in a single decoding step, and One-by-One, which iteratively generates strategy-response pairs until completion. Both methods are further enhanced with cognitive reasoning guided by reinforcement learning to improve strategy selection and response composition. We evaluate our models on the ESConv dataset under both utterance-level and dialogue-level settings. Experimental results show that our methods effectively model multi-strategy utterances and lead to improved supportive quality and dialogue success. To our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic empirical evidence that allowing multiple support strategies within a single utterance is both feasible and beneficial for emotional support conversations. All code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/aliyun/qwen-dianjin.

</details>


### [422] [ltzGLUE: Luxembourgish General Language Understanding Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17976)
*Alistair Plum,Felicia Körner,Anne-Marie Lutgen,Laura Bernardy,Fred Philippy,Emilia Milano,Nils Rehlinger,Cédric Lothritz,Tharindu Ranasinghe,Barbara Plank,Christoph Purschke*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 首个卢森堡语自然语言理解基准测试ltzGLUE，基于英文GLUE框架构建，包含命名实体识别、主题分类、意图分类等任务，评估了多种预训练语言模型在卢森堡语上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卢森堡语作为官方语言之一，在自然语言理解领域长期被忽视。虽然许多欧洲语言已有NLU任务，但卢森堡语缺乏系统的评估基准，需要建立首个官方NLU基准来推动该语言的技术发展。

Method: 基于英文GLUE基准框架，构建新的任务并复用现有任务，创建首个卢森堡语NLU基准ltzGLUE。任务包括二进制和多类别分类设置，涵盖命名实体识别、主题分类和意图分类等常见NLP任务。

Result: 评估了多种卢森堡语预训练语言模型，提供了这些模型在卢森堡语上当前能力的全面概览，为后续研究提供了基准参考。

Conclusion: 成功创建了首个卢森堡语NLU基准ltzGLUE，填补了该语言在自然语言理解评估方面的空白，为卢森堡语NLP研究提供了重要的基础设施和评估标准。

Abstract: This paper presents ltzGLUE, the first Natural Language Understanding (NLU) benchmark for Luxembourgish (LTZ) based on the popular GLUE benchmark for English. Although NLU tasks are available for many European languages nowadays, LTZ is one of the official national languages that is often overlooked. We construct new tasks and reuse existing ones to introduce the first official NLU benchmark and accompanying evaluation of encoder models for the language. Our tasks include common natural language processing tasks in binary and multi-class classification settings, including named entity recognition, topic classification, and intent classification. We evaluate various pre-trained language models for LTZ to present an overview of the current capabilities of these models on the LTZ language.

</details>


### [423] [Employing General-Purpose and Biomedical Large Language Models with Advanced Prompt Engineering for Pharmacoepidemiologic Study Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17988)
*Xinyao Zhang,Nicole Sonne Heckmann,Manuela Del Castillo Suero,Francesco Paolo Speca,Maurizio Sessa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 评估通用LLMs与生物医学LLMs在药物流行病学研究设计中的表现，发现通用LLMs（GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1）配合LTM提示策略表现最佳，而生物医学LLMs表现较差且缺乏充分论证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在药物流行病学研究设计自动化方面具有潜力，但其可靠性尚未充分验证。通用LLMs常有不准确之处，而生物医学LLMs在该领域的表现尚不清楚，需要系统比较。

Method: 使用46个HMA-EMA目录和哨兵系统协议（2018-2024），评估通用LLMs（GPT-4o、DeepSeek-R1）与生物医学LLMs（Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B、qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa）。采用Least-to-Most和Active Prompting策略，从相关性、论证逻辑和本体代码一致性三个维度评估性能。

Result: GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1配合LTM提示策略获得最高的相关性和论证逻辑分数，GPT-4o-LTM在9个问题中的8个达到中位数相关性分数4。生物医学LLMs整体相关性较低且论证不足。所有LLMs在本体代码映射方面表现有限，但LTM在推理稳定性方面提供最一致的改进。

Conclusion: 现成的通用LLMs目前在药物流行病学研究设计支持方面优于生物医学LLMs。提示策略对LLM性能有强烈影响，LTM策略能显著提升推理稳定性。

Abstract: Background: The potential of large language models (LLMs) to automate and support pharmacoepidemiologic study design is an emerging area of interest, yet their reliability remains insufficiently characterized. General-purpose LLMs often display inaccuracies, while the comparative performance of specialized biomedical LLMs in this domain remains unknown. Methods: This study evaluated general-purpose LLMs (GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1) versus biomedically fine-tuned LLMs (QuantFactory/Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B-GGUF and Irathernotsay/qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune) using 46 protocols (2018-2024) from the HMA-EMA Catalogue and Sentinel System. Performance was assessed across relevance, logic of justification, and ontology-code agreement across multiple coding systems using Least-to-Most (LTM) and Active Prompting strategies. Results: GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1 paired with LTM prompting achieved the highest relevance and logic of justification scores, with GPT-4o-LTM reaching a median relevance score of 4 in 8 of 9 questions for HMA-EMA protocols. Biomedical LLMs showed lower relevance overall and frequently generated insufficient justification. All LLMs demonstrated limited proficiency in ontology-code mapping, although LTM provided the most consistent improvements in reasoning stability. Conclusion: Off-the-shelf general-purpose LLMs currently offer superior support for pharmacoepidemiologic design compared to biomedical LLMs. Prompt strategy strongly influenced LLM performance.

</details>


### [424] [How Creative Are Large Language Models in Generating Molecules?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18031)
*Wen Tao,Yiwei Wang,Peng Zhou,Bryan Hooi,Wanlong Fang,Tianle Zhang,Xiao Luo,Yuansheng Liu,Alvin Chan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，系统评估了LLMs在分子生成中的创造性行为，发现LLMs表现出收敛性和发散性两种互补的创造力模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子生成需要满足多种化学和生物约束，同时搜索大规模结构化化学空间，这使得它成为一个非二元问题。LLMs可以直接从自然语言提示生成分子表示，但尚不清楚它们在此场景中表现出何种创造力以及如何评估这种创造力。

Method: 通过系统实证评估，在物理化学、ADMET和生物活性任务中研究LLMs在分子生成中的创造性行为。将创造力分为两个互补维度：收敛创造力和发散创造力，并分析不同因素如何塑造这些行为。

Result: LLMs在分子生成中表现出独特的创造性行为模式，例如当施加额外约束时，约束满足度会增加。研究揭示了LLMs在分子生成中的收敛性和发散性创造力特征。

Conclusion: 这是首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，为LLM基础的分子生成中的创造力提供了系统理解，并阐明了LLMs在分子发现流程中的适当使用方式。

Abstract: Molecule generation requires satisfying multiple chemical and biological constraints while searching a large and structured chemical space. This makes it a non-binary problem, where effective models must identify non-obvious solutions under constraints while maintaining exploration to improve success by escaping local optima. From this perspective, creativity is a functional requirement in molecular generation rather than an aesthetic notion. Large language models (LLMs) can generate molecular representations directly from natural language prompts, but it remains unclear what type of creativity they exhibit in this setting and how it should be evaluated. In this work, we study the creative behavior of LLMs in molecular generation through a systematic empirical evaluation across physicochemical, ADMET, and biological activity tasks. We characterize creativity along two complementary dimensions, convergent creativity and divergent creativity, and analyze how different factors shape these behaviors. Our results indicate that LLMs exhibit distinct patterns of creative behavior in molecule generation, such as an increase in constraint satisfaction when additional constraints are imposed. Overall, our work is the first to reframe the abilities required for molecule generation as creativity, providing a systematic understanding of creativity in LLM-based molecular generation and clarifying the appropriate use of LLMs in molecular discovery pipelines.

</details>


### [425] [SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18034)
*Muxin Pu,Xiao-Ming Wu,Mei Kuan Lim,Chun Yong Chong,Wei Li,Chen Change Loy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SignDPO是一个用于骨架手语翻译的多层次直接偏好优化框架，通过空间、时间和语言三个维度的偏好对齐，解决现有模仿式方法的语义漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前骨架手语翻译模型主要基于最大似然估计，采用模仿式范式，缺乏对精细时空细微差异的判别敏感性，导致语义漂移。需要从简单序列模仿转向结构化偏好对齐。

Method: 1. 分层扰动策略：自动构建全局和局部粒度的空间和时间非偏好样本；2. 自引导机制：利用解码器交叉注意力分数识别和扰动语义显著的骨架区域；3. 自动化语言级偏好生成器：微调专用扰动模型捕获复杂输出级失败模式。

Result: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准测试中，SignDPO持续优于最先进的无词汇方法，甚至可与成熟的基于词汇的方法相媲美。

Conclusion: 多层次偏好对齐是弥合高熵骨架轨迹与离散语言语义之间差距的强大范式，为骨架手语翻译提供了新的优化方向。

Abstract: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

</details>


### [426] [JudgeMeNot: Personalizing Large Language Models to Emulate Judicial Reasoning in Hebrew](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18041)
*Itay Razumenko,Arnon Sturm,Nir Grinberg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出合成-有机监督管道，将司法判决转换为指令调优数据，实现低资源环境下法官个性化模型的参数高效微调


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型取得显著进展，但为个体决策者（如法官）进行个性化定制仍是一个开放问题，特别是在低资源环境下

Method: 开发合成-有机监督管道，将原始司法决策转换为指令调优数据，采用因果语言建模结合合成生成的指令调优进行参数高效微调

Result: 因果语言建模结合合成指令调优显著优于所有基线方法，在词汇、风格和语义相似性方面均有显著提升，模型生成输出与人类法官推理难以区分

Conclusion: 该方法证明了在低资源环境下实现高效个性化的可行性，为司法决策等领域的个性化AI应用提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Despite significant advances in large language models, personalizing them for individual decision-makers remains an open problem. Here, we introduce a synthetic-organic supervision pipeline that transforms raw judicial decisions into instruction-tuning data, enabling parameter-efficient fine-tuning of personalized models for individual judges in low-resource settings. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art personalization techniques across three different tasks and settings. The results show that Causal Language Modeling followed by synthetically generated instruction-tuning significantly outperforms all other baselines, providing significant improvements across lexical, stylistic, and semantic similarity. Notably, our model-generated outputs are indistinguishable from the reasoning of human judges, highlighting the viability of efficient personalization, even in low-resource settings.

</details>


### [427] [Modeling Human Perspectives with Socio-Demographic Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18069)
*Leixin Zhang,Cagri Coltekin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，通过联合建模标注者视角和学习社会人口学表征，更好地解释人类主观观点差异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在NLP任务中，标注分歧反映了有效的主观视角差异。现有研究通常只关注单一人口学因素或有限组合，但真实世界中标注者视角由复杂社会背景塑造，更细粒度的人口学属性能更好地解释人类观点差异

Method: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口学表征。该方法有效融合社会人口学特征和文本表示来预测标注者视角，优于标准的基于拼接的方法

Result: 该方法在预测标注者视角方面表现优于标准方法，学习到的表征还能分析和可视化人口学因素如何与标注者视角变化相关联

Conclusion: Socio-Contrastive Learning为建模标注者视角和人口学表征提供了有效方法，有助于理解社会背景如何影响人类主观观点

Abstract: Humans often hold different perspectives on the same issues. In many NLP tasks, annotation disagreement can reflect valid subjective perspectives. Modeling annotator perspectives and understanding their relationship with other human factors, such as socio-demographic attributes, have received increasing attention. Prior work typically focuses on single demographic factors or limited combinations. However, in real-world settings, annotator perspectives are shaped by complex social contexts, and finer-grained socio-demographic attributes can better explain human perspectives. In this work, we propose Socio-Contrastive Learning, a method that jointly models annotator perspectives while learning socio-demographic representations. Our method provides an effective approach for the fusion of socio-demographic features and textual representations to predict annotator perspectives, outperforming standard concatenation-based methods. The learned representations further enable analysis and visualization of how demographic factors relate to variation in annotator perspectives. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/Leixin-Zhang/Socio_Contrastive_Learning

</details>


### [428] [Mix and Match: Context Pairing for Scalable Topic-Controlled Educational Summarisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18087)
*Nathikan Yodthapa,Thanapong Intharah,Sahan Bulathwela*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于主题控制摘要的数据增强方法，通过组合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练样本，使小语言模型能更有效地学习主题与摘要之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主题控制摘要能让用户生成针对特定方面的摘要，但训练小语言模型进行主题控制摘要面临数据不足的挑战，需要有效的数据增强策略。

Method: 提出成对数据增强方法，结合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练示例；使用SciTLDR数据集并加入维基百科衍生主题；系统评估增强规模对模型性能的影响。

Result: 随着增强规模增加，模型在胜率和语义对齐方面持续改进，而真实训练数据量保持不变；T5-base模型使用该方法后，在参数和真实训练样本大幅减少的情况下，仍能达到与更大模型竞争的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的数据增强策略能有效提升小语言模型在主题控制摘要任务上的性能，使其在资源有限的情况下仍能取得与更大模型竞争的结果。

Abstract: Topic-controlled summarisation enables users to generate summaries focused on specific aspects of source documents. This paper investigates a data augmentation strategy for training small language models (sLMs) to perform topic-controlled summarisation. We propose a pairwise data augmentation method that combines contexts from different documents to create contrastive training examples, enabling models to learn the relationship between topics and summaries more effectively. Using the SciTLDR dataset enriched with Wikipedia-derived topics, we systematically evaluate how augmentation scale affects model performance. Results show consistent improvements in win rate and semantic alignment as the augmentation scale increases, while the amount of real training data remains fixed. Consequently, a T5-base model trained with our augmentation approach achieves competitive performance relative to larger models, despite using significantly fewer parameters and substantially fewer real training examples.

</details>


### [429] [Culture-Aware Humorous Captioning: Multimodal Humor Generation across Cultural Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18091)
*Run Xu,Lu Li,Rongzhao Zhang,Jie Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出文化感知幽默字幕生成任务，通过多阶段对齐框架提升模型在特定文化背景下生成图像相关、文化适宜且幽默的字幕能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在生成幽默字幕时缺乏对明确文化背景的稳定控制，难以在指定文化背景下同时保持图像相关性、上下文适宜性和幽默质量。

Method: 提出多阶段对齐框架：1) 在西方文化背景下用高资源监督初始化模型；2) 通过基于评判的GRPO进行多维度偏好对齐，加入退化感知原型排斥约束缓解开放生成中的奖励黑客问题；3) 用少量监督将模型适配到东方文化背景。

Result: 实验结果显示该方法在提出的六维评估框架下取得更强的整体性能，在上下文适宜性方面提升显著，并在文化约束下更好地平衡了图像相关性和幽默性。

Conclusion: 提出的文化感知幽默字幕生成任务和方法有效解决了多模态模型在文化背景控制方面的局限性，通过多阶段对齐框架实现了更好的文化适应性和生成质量平衡。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models have shown promising ability in generating humorous captions for images, yet they still lack stable control over explicit cultural context, making it difficult to jointly maintain image relevance, contextual appropriateness, and humor quality under a specified cultural background. To address this limitation, we introduce a new multimodal generation task, culture-aware humorous captioning, which requires a model to generate a humorous caption conditioned on both an input image and a target cultural context. Captions generated under different cultural contexts are not expected to share the same surface form, but should remain grounded in similar visual situations or humorous rationales.To support this task, we establish a six-dimensional evaluation framework covering image relevance, contextual fit, semantic richness, reasonableness, humor, and creativity. We further propose a staged alignment framework that first initializes the model with high-resource supervision under the Western cultural context, then performs multi-dimensional preference alignment via judge-based GRPO with a Degradation-aware Prototype Repulsion Constraint to mitigate reward hacking in open-ended generation, and finally adapts the model to the Eastern cultural context with a small amount of supervision. Experimental results show that our method achieves stronger overall performance under the proposed evaluation framework, with particularly large gains in contextual fit and a better balance between image relevance and humor under cultural constraints.

</details>


### [430] [Efficient Low-Resource Language Adaptation via Multi-Source Dynamic Logit Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18106)
*Chen Zhang,Jiuheng Lin,Zhiyuan Liao,Yansong Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TriMix是一个测试时logit融合框架，通过动态平衡三个不同来源的能力来适应低资源语言：小模型的LRL能力、高资源语言指令调优的任务能力，以及大模型的缩放优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 适应大语言模型到低资源语言受到任务数据和计算资源稀缺的限制。现有的Proxy Tuning方法在LRL设置中经常失败，因为大模型的弱LRL能力可能会压倒专门小模型的知识。

Method: TriMix是一个测试时logit融合框架，动态平衡三个来源的能力：1) 持续预训练小模型的LRL能力，2) 高资源语言指令调优的任务能力，3) 大模型的缩放优势。该方法数据高效且计算高效，不需要LRL任务标注，只需要在小模型上进行持续预训练。

Result: 在四个模型家族和八种低资源语言的实验中，TriMix始终优于单模型基线和Proxy Tuning。分析表明，优先考虑小LRL专门模型的logits对成功至关重要，挑战了普遍存在的大模型主导假设。

Conclusion: TriMix通过动态融合三个不同来源的能力，为低资源语言适应提供了一种数据高效、计算高效的解决方案，挑战了传统的大模型主导假设，强调小LRL专门模型的重要性。

Abstract: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to low-resource languages (LRLs) is constrained by the scarcity of task data and computational resources. Although Proxy Tuning offers a logit-level strategy for introducing scaling effects, it often fails in LRL settings because the large model's weak LRL competence might overwhelm the knowledge of specialized smaller models. We thus propose TriMix, a test-time logit fusion framework that dynamically balances capabilities from three different sources: LRL competence from a continually pretrained small model, task competence from high-resource language instruction tuning, and the scaling benefits of large models. It is data- and compute-efficient, requiring no LRL task annotations, and only continual pretraining on a small model. Experiments across four model families and eight LRLs show that TriMix consistently outperforms single-model baselines and Proxy Tuning. Our analysis reveals that prioritizing the small LRL-specialized model's logits is crucial for success, challenging the prevalent large-model-dominant assumption.

</details>


### [431] [FLiP: Towards understanding and interpreting multimodal multilingual sentence embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18109)
*Santosh Kesiraju,Bolaji Yusuf,Šimon Sedláček,Oldřich Plchot,Petr Schwarz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FLiP模型通过因子化线性投影分析预训练句子嵌入空间，能够从多语言、多模态和API嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，优于现有基线，为理解嵌入空间的模态和语言偏见提供诊断工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以深入理解预训练句子嵌入空间的内在特性，特别是不同模态（多语言、多模态、API）嵌入空间的词汇内容和语言偏见。需要一种无需依赖下游任务的诊断工具来分析这些嵌入空间。

Method: 提出因子化线性投影（FLiP）模型，通过训练线性投影从句子嵌入中恢复原始词汇内容。在多种高资源和中资源语言上测试，覆盖LaBSE（多语言）、SONAR（多模态）和Gemini（API）三种不同类型的句子编码器。

Result: FLiP能够从嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于现有的非因子化基线方法。通过该工具揭示了所选句子编码器存在的模态和语言偏见，为实践者提供了内在洞察。

Conclusion: FLiP模型是一种有效的诊断工具，能够深入分析预训练句子嵌入空间的特性，揭示编码器的内在偏见，为理解和选择合适编码器提供了新的视角，无需依赖传统下游评估任务。

Abstract: This paper presents factorized linear projection (FLiP) models for understanding pretrained sentence embedding spaces. We train FLiP models to recover the lexical content from multilingual (LaBSE), multimodal (SONAR) and API-based (Gemini) sentence embedding spaces in several high- and mid-resource languages. We show that FLiP can recall more than 75% of lexical content from the embeddings, significantly outperforming existing non-factorized baselines. Using this as a diagnostic tool, we uncover the modality and language biases across the selected sentence encoders and provide practitioners with intrinsic insights about the encoders without relying on conventional downstream evaluation tasks. Our implementation is public https://github.com/BUTSpeechFIT/FLiP.

</details>


### [432] [Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18112)
*Yiheng Li,Weihai Lu,Hanyi Yu,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAMM：一种检索增强的多模态假新闻检测模型，通过抽象叙事对齐和语义表示对齐模块，解决跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态多领域假新闻检测面临两大挑战：1）现有模型孤立评估新闻，无法捕捉跨实例的叙事一致性，难以应对社交媒体驱动的集群式假新闻传播；2）传统模型仅依赖训练时编码的知识，难以泛化到新领域或数据稀缺领域（如新兴事件或小众话题）。

Method: RAMM采用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）作为主干，捕捉新闻样本的跨模态语义信息；引入抽象叙事对齐模块，自适应地从不同领域的多样实例中提取抽象叙事一致性并聚合相关知识；设计语义表示对齐模块，将模型的决策范式与人类对齐，从直接多模态特征推理转向基于实例的类比推理过程。

Result: 在三个公共数据集上的广泛实验验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: RAMM通过检索增强机制有效解决了跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战，为多模态多领域假新闻检测提供了创新解决方案。

Abstract: In recent years, multimodal multidomain fake news detection has garnered increasing attention. Nevertheless, this direction presents two significant challenges: (1) Failure to Capture Cross-Instance Narrative Consistency: existing models usually evaluate each news in isolation, fail to capture cross-instance narrative consistency, and thus struggle to address the spread of cluster based fake news driven by social media; (2) Lack of Domain Specific Knowledge for Reasoning: conventional models, which rely solely on knowledge encoded in their parameters during training, struggle to generalize to new or data-scarce domains (e.g., emerging events or niche topics). To tackle these challenges, we introduce Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection (RAMM). First, RAMM employs a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as its backbone to capture cross-modal semantic information from news samples. Second, RAMM incorporates an Abstract Narrative Alignment Module. This component adaptively extracts abstract narrative consistency from diverse instances across distinct domains, aggregates relevant knowledge, and thereby enables the modeling of high-level narrative information. Finally, RAMM introduces a Semantic Representation Alignment Module, which aligns the model's decision-making paradigm with that of humans - specifically, it shifts the model's reasoning process from direct inference on multimodal features to an instance-based analogical reasoning process. Extensive experimental results on three public datasets validate the efficacy of our proposed approach. Our code is available at the following link: https://github.com/li-yiheng/RAMM

</details>


### [433] [Decisive: Guiding User Decisions with Optimal Preference Elicitation from Unstructured Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18122)
*Akriti Jain,Anish Mulay,Divyansh Verma,Aishani Pandey,Pritika Ramu,Aparna Garimella*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Decisive是一个结合文档基础推理与贝叶斯偏好推断的交互式决策框架，通过主动学习用户潜在偏好向量，显著提升决策准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有决策方法（包括大语言模型和传统决策支持系统）存在不足：要么用过多信息淹没用户，要么无法准确捕捉细微偏好。决策制定需要从多个非结构化来源综合相关信息、权衡竞争因素并纳入主观用户偏好

Method: 结合文档基础推理与贝叶斯偏好推断：从源文档中提取客观选项评分矩阵，同时通过针对性启发主动学习用户的潜在偏好向量。用户回答自适应选择的成对权衡问题，以最大化最终决策的信息增益

Result: 在广泛实验中，该方法显著优于通用LLM和现有决策框架，在多个领域比强基线实现高达20%的决策准确率提升

Conclusion: Decisive框架能够高效收敛，最小化用户努力，同时确保推荐保持透明和个性化，解决了现有决策方法的局限性

Abstract: Decision-making is a cognitively intensive task that requires synthesizing relevant information from multiple unstructured sources, weighing competing factors, and incorporating subjective user preferences. Existing methods, including large language models and traditional decision-support systems, fall short: they often overwhelm users with information or fail to capture nuanced preferences accurately. We present Decisive, an interactive decision-making framework that combines document-grounded reasoning with Bayesian preference inference. Our approach grounds decisions in an objective option-scoring matrix extracted from source documents, while actively learning a user's latent preference vector through targeted elicitation. Users answer pairwise tradeoff questions adaptively selected to maximize information gain over the final decision. This process converges efficiently, minimizing user effort while ensuring recommendations remain transparent and personalized. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms both general-purpose LLMs and existing decision-making frameworks achieving up to 20% improvement in decision accuracy over strong baselines across domains.

</details>


### [434] [TLoRA: Task-aware Low Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18124)
*Weicheng Lin,Yi Zhang,Jiawei Dang,Liang-Jie Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TLoRA是一个统一的LoRA优化框架，通过数据驱动的初始化策略和基于敏感度的资源分配，在固定参数预算下显著提升各种任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LoRA变体通常只解决初始化、秩分配或缩放因子中的一个问题，往往以增加训练复杂度或降低实际效率为代价。需要一种统一框架来同时优化这些因素。

Method: TLoRA采用数据驱动的初始化策略，通过对预训练权重和输入激活协方差的乘积进行奇异值分解，将LoRA的A矩阵与任务相关子空间对齐。初始化后冻结A矩阵，只训练B矩阵。同时使用基于敏感度的重要性度量，在固定参数预算下自适应分配各层的秩和缩放因子。

Result: TLoRA在各种任务（自然语言理解、常识推理、数学推理、代码生成和聊天生成）中表现优异，同时显著减少了可训练参数数量。

Conclusion: TLoRA提供了一个统一的框架，能够同时优化LoRA的初始化和资源分配，在保持高效参数微调的同时，显著提升模型在各种任务上的性能。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely adopted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models, with its effectiveness largely influenced by the allocation of ranks and scaling factors, as well as initialization. Existing LoRA variants typically address only one of these factors, often at the cost of increased training complexity or reduced practical efficiency. In this work, we present Task-aware Low-Rank Adaptation (TLoRA), a unified framework that jointly optimizes initialization and resource allocation at the outset of training. TLoRA introduces a data-driven initialization strategy that aligns the LoRA $A$ matrix with task-relevant subspaces by performing singular value decomposition on the product of pre-trained weights and input activation covariance. After this, the $A$ matrix is frozen, and only the $B$ matrix is trained. Furthermore, TLoRA employs a sensitivity-based importance metric to adaptively allocate ranks and scaling factors across layers under a fixed parameter budget. We conduct extensive experiments that demonstrate TLoRA consistently performs excellently across various tasks, including natural language understanding, commonsense reasoning, math reasoning, code generation, and chat generation, while significantly reducing the number of trainable parameters.

</details>


### [435] [Depth Registers Unlock W4A4 on SwiGLU: A Reader/Generator Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18128)
*Ziyang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究在300M参数语言模型中，W4A4量化误差主要来自残差轴读取器(qkv,w1,w3)，通过训练时深度寄存器+铰链损失(DR+sink)可显著降低误差，但无法完全消除生成器(w2)的双线性尾部误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究W4A4量化误差的来源，特别是在残差轴上的误差分布，以理解哪些激活位置主导量化误差，从而开发有效的量化方法。

Method: 使用300M参数的SwiGLU解码器语言模型，在5B tokens上训练。采用深度寄存器+铰链损失(DR+sink)作为训练时干预，分析量化误差在残差轴读取器(qkv,w1,w3)和块内生成器(o_proj,w2)的分布。

Result: DR+sink将W4A4验证困惑度从1727降至119(约14倍改进)，与SmoothQuant结合可降至39.9 PPL。残差轴读取器的误差被有效控制，但生成器w2的双线性尾部误差无法完全消除，导致与FP16仍有约2 PPL差距。

Conclusion: W4A4量化误差主要由残差轴读取器主导，训练时干预可显著改善，但生成器的双线性特性限制了进一步改进。DR+sink作为诊断工具而非部署方案，揭示了量化误差的本质分布。

Abstract: We study post-training W4A4 quantization in a controlled 300M-parameter SwiGLU decoder-only language model trained on 5B tokens of FineWeb-Edu, and ask which input-activation sites dominate the error. Naive round-to-nearest W4A4 collapses validation perplexity from FP16 23.6 to 1727. A simple residual-axis training-time intervention -- Depth Registers with a register-magnitude hinge loss (DR+sink) -- reduces this to 119 (about 14x) at matched FP16 PPL and matched zero-shot capacity, and composes with SmoothQuant to 39.9 PPL. The residual ~2 PPL gap to FP16 is the diagnostic core. We decompose W4A4 damage by input-activation site: the five trainable linears in a SwiGLU block split into residual-axis readers (qkv, w1, w3) and block-internal generators (o_proj, w2). Elementary norm arguments show residual-axis magnitude control bounds readers tightly but leaves w2's bilinear input bounded only by the trivial product of factor bounds; empirically, DR+sink collapses reader kurtosis while leaving generators essentially unchanged, and the reader-rescued W4A4 residue is flat at ~0.28 nats across three matched checkpoints with Delta-remove(w2) dominating. We present DR+sink as a training-time probe rather than a deployment proposal: a post-hoc alternative (Per-Linear QuaRot) nearly matches it on the reader axis. Full QuaRot -- adding online per-head value Hadamard plus online w2-input rotation -- does not close the gap either, directly testing the prediction that orthogonal rotation cannot bound the bilinear SwiGLU tail. Claims are specific to our 300M, 5B-token, single-seed setting, and our experiments do not isolate the partition from the hinge.

</details>


### [436] [FreezeEmpath: Efficient Training for Empathetic Spoken Chatbots with Frozen LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18159)
*Yun Hong,Yan Zhou,Yang Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FreezeEmpath：一种基于冻结LLM参数的高效端到端共情语音对话系统，仅使用现有语音指令数据和SER数据训练，无需昂贵的共情语音指令数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的共情语音对话系统面临三个主要挑战：1）依赖昂贵的共情语音指令数据；2）生成语音缺乏情感表现力；3）跨模态共情指令数据微调可能导致灾难性遗忘和通用能力下降

Method: 提出FreezeEmpath方法，采用简单高效的训练策略：保持LLM参数冻结，仅使用现有语音指令数据和语音情感识别（SER）数据进行端到端训练

Result: 实验表明FreezeEmpath能够生成富有情感表现力的语音，在共情对话、SER和SpokenQA任务上优于其他共情模型，证明了训练策略的有效性

Conclusion: FreezeEmpath通过冻结LLM参数并利用现有数据资源，有效解决了共情语音对话系统的训练挑战，实现了高质量的情感表达和共情能力

Abstract: Empathy is essential for fostering natural interactions in spoken dialogue systems, as it enables machines to recognize the emotional tone of human speech and deliver empathetic responses. Recent research has made significant progress in developing empathetic spoken chatbots based on large language models (LLMs). However, several challenges still exist when training such models, including reliance on costly empathetic speech instruction data and a lack of emotional expressiveness in the generated speech. Finetuning LLM with cross-modal empathetic instruction data may also lead to catastrophic forgetting and a degradation of its general capability. To address these challenges, we propose FreezeEmpath, an end-to-end empathetic spoken chatbot trained in a simple and efficient manner. The entire training process relies solely on existing speech instruction data and speech emotion recognition (SER) data, while keeping the LLM's parameters frozen. Experiments demonstrate that FreezeEmpath is able to generate emotionally expressive speech and outperforms other empathetic models in empathetic dialogue, SER, and SpokenQA tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our training strategy.

</details>


### [437] [MM-JudgeBias: A Benchmark for Evaluating Compositional Biases in MLLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18164)
*Sua Lee,Sanghee Park,Jinbae Im*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MM-JudgeBias基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型作为评判者时的组合偏见问题，发现现有模型存在模态忽视和不对称评估倾向等系统性偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型作为自动评估器（MLLM-as-a-Judge）的应用日益增多，但其可靠性和对偏见的脆弱性尚未得到充分探索。研究发现许多MLLM评判者无法可靠地整合关键的视觉或文本线索，在证据缺失或不匹配时产生不可靠的评估，并在语义无关扰动下表现出不稳定性。

Method: 系统性地定义了MLLM-as-a-Judge系统中的组合偏见，并引入了MM-JudgeBias基准来评估这种偏见。该基准通过对查询、图像和响应进行受控扰动，并使用两个互补指标：用于测量敏感性的偏见偏差（BD）和用于测量稳定性的偏见一致性（BC）。数据集包含超过1,800个从29个源基准中精心策划和细化的多模态样本。

Result: 对26个最先进的MLLM进行的实验揭示了系统性的模态忽视和不对称评估倾向，表明现有评判者存在严重的偏见问题。MM-JudgeBias基准能够对9种偏见类型在不同任务和领域中进行细粒度诊断。

Conclusion: MLLM作为评判者存在显著的组合偏见问题，需要开发更可靠的评判系统。MM-JudgeBias基准为系统评估这些偏见提供了有效工具，揭示了当前模型的局限性，并强调了改进多模态评估可靠性的必要性。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been increasingly used as automatic evaluators-a paradigm known as MLLM-as-a-Judge. However, their reliability and vulnerabilities to biases remain underexplored. We find that many MLLM judges fail to reliably integrate key visual or textual cues, yielding unreliable evaluations when evidence is missing or mismatched, and exhibiting instability under semantically irrelevant perturbations. To address this, we systematically define Compositional Bias in MLLM-as-a-Judge systems and introduce MM-JudgeBias, a benchmark for evaluating it. MM-JudgeBias introduces controlled perturbations across Query, Image, and Response, and evaluates model behavior via two complementary metrics: Bias-Deviation (BD) for sensitivity and Bias-Conformity (BC) for stability. Our dataset of over 1,800 curated and refined multimodal samples, drawn from 29 source benchmarks, enables a fine-grained diagnosis of nine bias types across diverse tasks and domains. Experiments on 26 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal systematic modality neglect and asymmetric evaluation tendencies, underscoring the need for more reliable judges.

</details>


### [438] [Beyond Reproduction: A Paired-Task Framework for Assessing LLM Comprehension and Creativity in Literary Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18169)
*Ran Zhang,Steffen Eger,Arda Tezcan,Wei Zhao,Simone Paolo Ponzetto,Lieve Macken*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究评估了23个大型语言模型在文学翻译中的创造潜力，发现即使模型具备良好的源文本理解能力，也难以达到人类水平的翻译创造力，尤其是在英语-中文这种语言距离较远的翻译中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型在创意任务如文学翻译中的应用日益增多，但翻译创造力研究不足，且缺乏大规模评估。源文本理解通常被孤立研究，而专业翻译中理解与创造力是紧密交织的。需要填补这些研究空白。

Method: 采用配对任务框架，从11本书中选取文学摘录。任务1评估源文本理解能力，任务2通过"创意潜力单元"（如隐喻、文字游戏）评估翻译创造力。结合专家人工标注和基于UCP的自动评分，建立可扩展的评估体系，对23个模型和4种创造力导向的提示进行基准测试。

Result: 研究发现：1）强大的理解能力并不能转化为人类水平的创造力；2）模型常产生字面或上下文不恰当的翻译；3）英语-中文语言对存在特别大的创造力差距；4）创造力导向的提示仅带来有限的提升；5）只有Mistral-Large模型接近人类创造力水平（0.167 vs. 0.246）；6）所有模型-提示组合中，只有三个超过0.1的创造力分数，其余接近零。

Conclusion: 当前大型语言模型在文学翻译创造力方面仍有显著局限，特别是在处理语言距离较远的翻译任务时。需要开发更先进的模型和提示策略来提升翻译创造力，理解与创造力的结合仍是重要挑战。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for creative tasks such as literary translation. Yet translational creativity remains underexplored and is rarely evaluated at scale, while source-text comprehension is typically studied in isolation, despite the fact that, in professional translation, comprehension and creativity are tightly intertwined. We address these gaps with a paired-task framework applied to literary excerpts from 11 books. Task 1 assesses source-text comprehension, and Task 2 evaluates translational creativity through Units of Creative Potential (UCPs), such as metaphors and wordplay. Using a scalable evaluation setup that combines expert human annotations with UCP-based automatic scoring, we benchmark 23 models and four creativity-oriented prompts. Our findings show that strong comprehension does not translate into human-level creativity: models often produce literal or contextually inappropriate renderings, with particularly large gaps for the more distant English-Chinese language pair. Creativity-oriented prompts yield only modest gains, and only one model, Mistral-Large, comes close to human-level creativity (0.167 vs. 0.246). Across all model-prompt combinations, only three exceed a creativity score of 0.1, while the rest remain at or near zero.

</details>


### [439] [Copy-as-Decode: Grammar-Constrained Parallel Prefill for LLM Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18170)
*Ziyang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Copy-as-Decode：一种通过结构化解码机制加速LLM编辑任务的方法，使用<copy>和<gen>两种原语，通过并行预填充而非自回归生成来复制输入内容，显著提升编辑速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在编辑文本和代码时，即使大部分标记在输入中已存在，仍需要自回归地重新生成完整输出，这造成了不必要的计算开销。作者希望设计一种更高效的编辑机制。

Method: 提出Copy-as-Decode方法，将编辑生成重新定义为基于两种原语的结构化解码：<copy lines="i-j"/>引用输入行范围，<gen>...</gen>生成新内容。使用词元级FSM保证语法有效性，并通过服务层原语使用单次并行预填充前向传播更新KV缓存，而非N次自回归步骤。

Result: 1) 内核加速：在Qwen2.5模型上，通过并行预填充复制N个标记比自回归快6.8×-303×；2) 复制覆盖率：在编辑任务中，74%-98%的金标标记可通过行级原语覆盖，结合语料库跨度直方图得到29.0×/3.4×/4.2×的闭式挂钟时间界限；3) 管道无损性：确定性解析器在所有482个案例中都能正确往返，下游失败仅源于跨度选择而非机制本身。

Conclusion: Copy-as-Decode提供了一种无需端到端训练即可显著加速LLM编辑任务的方法，通过结构化解码和并行预填充机制实现了计算效率的大幅提升，为后续批量服务集成和多文件覆盖奠定了基础。

Abstract: LLMs edit text and code by autoregressively regenerating the full output, even when most tokens appear verbatim in the input. We study Copy-as-Decode, a decoding-layer mechanism that recasts edit generation as structured decoding over a two-primitive grammar: <copy lines="i-j"/> references an input line range, <gen>...</gen> emits new content. A token-level FSM guarantees syntactic validity, and a serving-layer primitive updates the KV cache for each copy span via a single parallel-prefill forward rather than $N$ autoregressive steps -- sharing the parallel-forward kernel of speculative decoding but with input tokens as the draft and program-enforced acceptance replacing probabilistic verification. We report an upper-bound analysis that requires no end-to-end training. (i) Kernel speedup: on Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B}, copying $N$ tokens via parallel prefill is $6.8\times$--$303\times$ faster than autoregressive ($N \in [8, 512]$, A100 80GB bf16). (ii) Copy ceiling: on ProbeEdit and HumanEvalPack-Fix (Py/JS), $74$--$98\%$ of gold tokens are reachable under the line-level primitive; composed with the empirical kernel over each corpus's span histogram this yields a closed-form wall-clock bound of $29.0\times / 3.4\times / 4.2\times$ ($13.0\times$ pooled). A token-level extension reaches $91$--$99\%$ coverage with $4.5\times$--$6.5\times$ floors. (iii) Pipeline losslessness: oracle programs round-trip through the deterministic resolver on all $482$ cases, localizing any downstream failure to span selection rather than the mechanism. A perturbation study shows pooled EM drops from $100\%$ to $15.48\%$ under off-by-one noise. A fine-tuning pilot on Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B lifts HEvalFix-Py EM from $0/33$ (untrained) to $12$--$17\%$, a learnability signal, not a production selector. Batched-serving integration and multi-file coverage are scoped as follow-up.

</details>


### [440] [STaD: Scaffolded Task Design for Identifying Compositional Skill Gaps in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18177)
*Sungeun An,Swanand Ravindra Kadhe,Shailja Thakur,Chad DeLuca,Hima Patel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出STaD框架，通过结构化、渐进式的任务变体系统性地探测LLM在组合推理技能上的缺陷，而非仅看基准测试总分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试的聚合分数难以揭示LLM在组合推理技能上的具体缺陷和改进方向，需要更精细的分析方法。

Method: 提出Scaffolded Task Design (STaD)框架，基于"脚手架"概念生成基准任务的受控变体，通过结构化、渐进式的支持步骤系统探测模型行为。

Result: 在6个不同规模的模型和3个推理基准上的实验揭示了多个失败点，并突出了每个模型独特且不同的技能缺陷。

Conclusion: STaD框架能够系统、可扩展地识别LLM缺乏的具体推理技能组合，为理解模型能力提供了比基准测试分数更深入的洞察。

Abstract: Benchmarks are often used as a standard to understand LLM capabilities in different domains. However, aggregate benchmark scores provide limited insight into compositional skill gaps of LLMs and how to improve them. To make these weaknesses visible, we propose Scaffolded Task Design (STaD) framework. STaD generates controlled variations of benchmark tasks based on the concept of scaffolding, which introduces structured, incremental support in a step-by-step manner. Rather than inspecting failures individually, this approach enables systematic and scalable probing of model behavior by identifying the specific reasoning skill compositions they lack. Treating the LLM as a black box, our experiments on six models of varying sizes reveal multiple failure points in three reasoning benchmarks and highlight each model's unique and distinct skill gaps.

</details>


### [441] [Linear-Time and Constant-Memory Text Embeddings Based on Recurrent Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18199)
*Tobias Grantner,Emanuel Sallinger,Martin Flechl*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于循环架构的垂直分块推理策略，实现内存使用随输入长度恒定，验证Mamba2等模型作为高效文本嵌入器的可行性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer嵌入模型存在二次计算复杂度和线性内存复杂度问题，限制了其在长序列处理中的应用。需要寻找更高效的替代方案来处理长文本嵌入任务。

Method: 提出循环架构作为高效替代方案，引入垂直分块推理策略，使内存使用在输入长度超过垂直分块大小时保持恒定。通过微调Mamba2模型验证其作为通用文本嵌入器的可行性。

Result: 在多个基准测试中达到有竞争力的性能，同时相比Transformer模型显著减少内存占用。验证了该推理策略在Mamba2、RWKV和xLSTM模型上的适用性，确认了跨架构一致的运行时-内存权衡。

Conclusion: 循环模型是Transformer的高效替代方案，可用于高效的嵌入生成。垂直分块推理策略使内存使用恒定，为长序列处理提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Transformer-based embedding models suffer from quadratic computational and linear memory complexity, limiting their utility for long sequences. We propose recurrent architectures as an efficient alternative, introducing a vertically chunked inference strategy that enables fast embedding generation with memory usage that becomes constant in the input length once it exceeds the vertical chunk size. By fine-tuning Mamba2 models, we demonstrate their viability as general-purpose text embedders, achieving competitive performance across a range of benchmarks while maintaining a substantially smaller memory footprint compared to transformer-based counterparts. We empirically validate the applicability of our inference strategy to Mamba2, RWKV, and xLSTM models, confirming consistent runtime-memory trade-offs across architectures and establishing recurrent models as a compelling alternative to transformers for efficient embedding generation.

</details>


### [442] [Multiplication in Multimodal LLMs: Computation with Text, Image, and Audio Inputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18203)
*Samuel G. Balter,Ethan Jerzak,Connor T. Jerzak*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多模态LLM在跨模态感知数字内容时表现准确，但在执行多位数乘法时失败，无论数字以何种形式呈现。研究引入了一个受控的多模态乘法基准测试，发现准确率随算术负载C增加而急剧下降，且性能下降主要是计算而非感知问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏跨模态的系统配对实例，难以比较模型家族内外的真正算术能力限制。多模态LLM在感知数字内容时表现良好，但在执行相同算术问题时却失败，无论数字以何种形式呈现。

Method: 引入受控的多模态乘法基准测试，通过可重复生成器因子化变化数字长度、数字稀疏性、表示形式（如数字vs数字词）和模态（文本、渲染图像、音频）。定义算术负载C作为总数字数和非零数字数的乘积。使用强制完成损失探针评估模型倾向于遵循的启发式推理过程。

Result: 准确率随算术负载C增加而急剧下降，通常在C>100时接近零。C在不同模态和模型中保持预测性（R-squared常>0.5）。多模态性能下降主要是计算而非感知问题（匹配感知检查准确率>99%）。分解启发式在文本和视觉模态中都受到青睐。

Conclusion: 多模态LLM的算术失败主要是计算限制而非感知问题。算术负载C是一个有效的性能预测指标。模型倾向于使用分解启发式，且基础模型维持着良好调整的内部路由器来选择计算策略。

Abstract: Multimodal LLMs can accurately perceive numerical content across modalities yet fail to perform exact multi-digit multiplication when the identical underlying arithmetic problem is presented as numerals, number words, images, or in audio form. Because existing benchmarks often lack systematically paired instances across modalities, it remains difficult to compare genuine arithmetic limits within and across model families. We therefore introduce a controlled multimodal multiplication benchmark that factorially varies digit length, digit sparsity, representation (e.g., numerals vs. number words), and modality (text, rendered images, audio), with paired instances from a reproducible generator. We also define arithmetic load, C, as the product of the total and non-zero digit count as a compact, mechanistically motivated proxy for operation count. Across evaluations, accuracy falls sharply as C grows, often nearing zero by C > 100. Indeed, C remains predictive of performance across modalities and models, with R-squared often > 0.5, nearing the value from more complex measures of arithmetic load that count the number of intermediate arithmetic steps. A separate perception-versus-computation decomposition shows that multimodal degradation is primarily computational rather than perceptual: on matched-perception checks, models are near-perfect (> 99%) across modalities, even when multiplication accuracy drops. Beyond measuring when models fail, we ask which procedures they are predisposed to follow. We introduce a forced-completion loss probe that scores heuristic-specific reasoning prefixes--including columnar multiplication, distributive decomposition, and rounding/compensation. Here, decomposition is favored in both text and vision modalities; heuristic-specific LoRA adapters produce near-orthogonal updates yet degrade accuracy, indicating the base model maintains a well-tuned internal router.

</details>


### [443] [Hard to Be Heard: Phoneme-Level ASR Analysis of Phonologically Complex, Low-Resource Endangered Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18204)
*V. S. D. S. Mahesh Akavarapu,Michael Daniel,Gerhard Jäger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究对两种低资源、音系复杂的东高加索语言（Archi和Rutul）进行音素级ASR分析，发现数据稀缺比音系复杂性更能解释识别错误，并展示了音素级评估在理解低资源复杂语言ASR行为中的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解自动语音识别在低资源、音系复杂语言中的表现，特别是要区分音系复杂性和数据稀缺对ASR错误的影响。通过音素级分析来深入理解ASR模型在极端低资源条件下的行为。

Method: 方法包括：1) 整理和标准化Archi（约50分钟）和Rutul（约1小时20分钟）的语音-文本资源；2) 评估wav2vec2、Whisper和Qwen2-Audio等SOTA模型；3) 为wav2vec2引入语言特定音素词汇表和启发式输出层初始化；4) 进行详细的音素级错误分析，包括训练频率与识别准确率的关系分析。

Result: 结果显示：1) 改进的wav2vec2方法在极端低资源条件下性能达到或超过Whisper；2) 音素识别准确率与训练频率强相关，呈现S型学习曲线；3) 对于Archi语言，Whisper的这种关系部分打破，表明模型特定的泛化效应；4) 许多归因于音系复杂性的错误实际上更好地由数据稀缺解释。

Conclusion: 结论是音素级评估对于理解低资源、类型学复杂语言中的ASR行为具有重要价值，数据稀缺比音系复杂性更能解释ASR错误，这为低资源语言ASR研究提供了新的见解和方法。

Abstract: We present a phoneme-level analysis of automatic speech recognition (ASR) for two low-resourced and phonologically complex East Caucasian languages, Archi and Rutul, based on curated and standardized speech-transcript resources totaling approximately 50 minutes and 1 hour 20 minutes of audio, respectively. Existing recordings and transcriptions are consolidated and processed into a form suitable for ASR training and evaluation. We evaluate several state-of-the-art audio and audio-language models, including wav2vec2, Whisper, and Qwen2-Audio. For wav2vec2, we introduce a language-specific phoneme vocabulary with heuristic output-layer initialization, which yields consistent improvements and achieves performance comparable to or exceeding Whisper in these extremely low-resource settings. Beyond standard word and character error rates, we conduct a detailed phoneme-level error analysis. We find that phoneme recognition accuracy strongly correlates with training frequency, exhibiting a characteristic sigmoid-shaped learning curve. For Archi, this relationship partially breaks for Whisper, pointing to model-specific generalization effects beyond what is predicted by training frequency. Overall, our results indicate that many errors attributed to phonological complexity are better explained by data scarcity. These findings demonstrate the value of phoneme-level evaluation for understanding ASR behavior in low-resource, typologically complex languages.

</details>


### [444] [Model in Distress: Sentiment Analysis on French Synthetic Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18226)
*Pierre-Carl Langlais,Pavel Chizhov,Yannick Detrois,Carlos Rosas Hinostroza,Ivan P. Yamshchikov,Bastien Perroy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一个合成数据生成管道，用于解决社交媒体客户反馈分析中的标注成本高、评估数据稀缺和隐私问题，在法国公共交通客户困扰检测案例中取得良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体客户反馈分析面临三大挑战：标注训练数据成本高、评估数据集稀缺（尤其在多语言场景）、隐私问题阻碍数据共享和可复现性。

Method: 开发通用合成数据生成管道，采用反向翻译和微调模型，从少量种子语料生成170万条合成推文，并加入合成推理轨迹，训练6亿参数推理模型。

Result: 训练出的英法双语推理模型在人工标注评估数据上达到77-79%准确率，匹配或超越最先进的专有LLM和专用编码器。

Conclusion: 该方法不仅降低标注成本，还能保护隐私（避免敏感用户数据暴露），且可扩展到其他用例和语言。

Abstract: Automated analysis of customer feedback on social media is hindered by three challenges: the high cost of annotated training data, the scarcity of evaluation sets, especially in multilingual settings, and privacy concerns that prevent data sharing and reproducibility. We address these issues by developing a generalizable synthetic data generation pipeline applied to a case study on customer distress detection in French public transportation. Our approach utilizes backtranslation with fine-tuned models to generate 1.7 million synthetic tweets from a small seed corpus, complemented by synthetic reasoning traces. We train 600M-parameter reasoners with English and French reasoning that achieve 77-79% accuracy on human-annotated evaluation data, matching or exceeding SOTA proprietary LLMs and specialized encoders. Beyond reducing annotation costs, our pipeline preserves privacy by eliminating the exposure of sensitive user data. Our methodology can be adopted for other use cases and languages.

</details>


### [445] [Negative Advantage Is a Double-Edged Sword: Calibrating Advantage in GRPO for Deep Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18235)
*Jiayi Wu,Ruobing Xie,Zeqian Huang,Lei Jiang,Can Xu,Kangyang Luo,Ming Gao,Xiang Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对深度搜索任务中的GRPO算法问题，提出CalibAdv优势校准方法，通过细粒度负优势降级和正负优势再平衡，提升模型性能和训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO在深度搜索场景中存在两个主要问题：1) 中间步骤正确性与最终奖励信号不匹配，导致许多正确的中间步骤在最终答案错误时被错误惩罚；2) 训练高度不稳定，常导致自然语言能力退化甚至训练崩溃。

Method: 提出CalibAdv优势校准方法：1) 利用中间步骤的正确性在细粒度级别降级过度的负优势；2) 在答案组件中重新平衡正负优势。

Result: 在三个模型和七个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，CalibAdv显著提升了模型性能和训练稳定性。

Conclusion: CalibAdv通过解决GRPO在深度搜索任务中的优势分配不平衡问题，有效提升了深度搜索代理的性能和训练稳定性。

Abstract: Deep search agents can autonomously initiate multi-turn interactions with search engines, thereby exhibiting strong question-answering capabilities. Such performance critically relies on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as its core training algorithm. However, GRPO still faces several challenges in deep search settings. First, there exists a substantial mismatch between the correctness of intermediate steps and the reward signal, causing numerous correct intermediate steps to be incorrectly penalized when the final answer is wrong. Second, training is highly unstable, often resulting in degradation of natural language ability or even catastrophic training collapse. Our analysis attributes these issues to coarse-grained advantage assignment and an imbalance between positive and negative advantages. To address these problems, we propose CalibAdv, an advantage calibration method specifically designed for deep search tasks. Specifically, CalibAdv leverages the correctness of intermediate steps to downscale excessive negative advantages at a fine-grained level. It then rebalances positive and negative advantages in the answer component. Extensive experiments across three models and seven benchmarks demonstrate that CalibAdv improves both model performance and training stability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wujwyi/CalibAdv.

</details>


### [446] [Where Do Self-Supervised Speech Models Become Unfair?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18249)
*Felix Herron,Maja Hjuler,Solange Rossato,Alexandre Allauzen,François Portet*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 首次对预训练自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析，发现语音识别和说话人识别任务存在相反的层间偏差模式，且偏差在预训练阶段就已形成难以消除。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音编码器模型对某些说话人群体的建模效果优于其他群体，但技术层面的原因尚不清楚。本研究旨在首次对预训练自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析，探究不同任务中的偏差模式。

Method: 对预训练自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析，在每个嵌入层上探测说话人识别和自动语音识别任务，研究不同说话人群体的偏差模式。

Result: 发现S3M模型对两个任务都产生针对特定说话人群体的偏差，从最早的潜在层就开始出现。说话人识别偏差在最小化整体SID错误的层中最小化，而ASR偏差在最小化整体ASR错误的层中最大化。即使对ASR进行微调，这种相反的偏差/错误关系也不受影响。

Conclusion: 说话人群体的偏差在预训练阶段就已建立且难以消除，这对语音技术的公平性提出了重要挑战，需要重新思考预训练策略以解决系统性偏差问题。

Abstract: Speech encoder models are known to model members of some speaker groups (SGs) better than others. However, there has been little work in establishing why this occurs on a technological level. To our knowledge, we present the first layerwise fairness analysis of pretrained self-supervised speech encoder models (S3Ms), probing each embedding layer for speaker identification (SID) automatic speech recognition (ASR). We find S3Ms produce embeddings biased against certain SGs for both tasks, starting at the very first latent layers. Furthermore, we find opposite patterns of layerwise bias for SID vs ASR for all models in our study: SID bias is minimized in layers that minimize overall SID error; on the other hand, ASR bias is maximized in layers that minimize overall ASR error. The inverse bias/error relationship for ASR is unaffected when probing S3Ms that are finetuned for ASR, suggesting SG-level bias is established during pretraining and is difficult to remove.

</details>


### [447] [An Existence Proof for Neural Language Models That Can Explain Garden-Path Effects via Surprisal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18293)
*Ryo Yoshida,Shinnosuke Isono,Taiga Someya,Yohei Oseki,Tatsuki Kuribayashi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过微调语言模型来对齐惊奇度与人类阅读时间，证明了神经网络语言模型能够通过惊奇度同时解释花园路径效应和自然主义阅读时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统惊奇度理论使用现成语言模型作为人类预测代理，虽然能解释简单句子的处理难度，但严重低估了需要句法消歧的花园路径句的处理难度，导致有人认为这类句子的处理难度不能简化为惊奇度。本文旨在探究是否可能构建一个神经网络语言模型，能够通过惊奇度解释花园路径效应。

Method: 不评估现成的神经网络语言模型，而是在花园路径句子上微调这些模型，使基于惊奇度的阅读时间估计更好地与人类实际阅读时间对齐。研究评估了微调后的模型是否过拟合，以及能否成功捕捉人类在保留花园路径项目上的阅读减速。

Result: 微调后的语言模型没有过拟合，成功捕捉了人类在保留花园路径项目上的阅读减速；甚至提高了对自然主义语料库中人类阅读时间的预测能力，并保留了其一般语言模型能力。

Conclusion: 结果证明了存在一种神经网络语言模型能够通过惊奇度同时解释花园路径效应和自然主义阅读时间，但也提出了一个理论问题：什么样的证据才能真正证伪惊奇度理论？

Abstract: Surprisal theory hypothesizes that the difficulty of human sentence processing increases linearly with surprisal, the negative log-probability of a word given its context. Computational psycholinguistics has tested this hypothesis using language models (LMs) as proxies for human prediction. While surprisal derived from recent neural LMs generally captures human processing difficulty on naturalistic corpora that predominantly consist of simple sentences, it severely underestimates processing difficulty on sentences that require syntactic disambiguation (garden-path effects). This leads to the claim that the processing difficulty of such sentences cannot be reduced to surprisal, although it remains possible that neural LMs simply differ from humans in next-word prediction. In this paper, we investigate whether it is truly impossible to construct a neural LM that can explain garden-path effects via surprisal. Specifically, instead of evaluating off-the-shelf neural LMs, we fine-tune these LMs on garden-path sentences so as to better align surprisal-based reading-time estimates with actual human reading times. Our results show that fine-tuned LMs do not overfit and successfully capture human reading slowdowns on held-out garden-path items; they even improve predictive power for human reading times on naturalistic corpora and preserve their general LM capabilities. These results provide an existence proof for a neural LM that can explain both garden-path effects and naturalistic reading times via surprisal, but also raise a theoretical question: what kind of evidence can truly falsify surprisal theory?

</details>


### [448] [Exploring Concreteness Through a Figurative Lens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18296)
*Saptarshi Ghosh,Tianyu Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs在内部表示中形成一致的一维具体性方向，可用于高效比喻语言分类和无训练生成控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态具体性评分在NLP中广泛使用，但词语的具体性会随上下文变化，尤其是在比喻语言中。虽然这种变化可以从上下文中看出，但LLMs如何在内部理解具体性仍不清楚。

Method: 对四个模型家族的隐藏表示进行分层和几何分析，研究模型如何区分同一名词的字面和比喻用法，以及具体性在表示空间中的组织方式。

Result: LLMs在早期层分离字面和比喻用法，中后期层将具体性压缩为一致的一维方向。这个几何结构可用于高效比喻语言分类和无训练生成控制。

Conclusion: LLMs在内部表示中形成跨模型一致的具体性几何结构，这一发现不仅揭示了模型理解具体性的机制，还具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Static concreteness ratings are widely used in NLP, yet a word's concreteness can shift with context, especially in figurative language such as metaphor, where common concrete nouns can take abstract interpretations. While such shifts are evident from context, it remains unclear how LLMs understand concreteness internally. We conduct a layer-wise and geometric analysis of LLM hidden representations across four model families, examining how models distinguish literal vs figurative uses of the same noun and how concreteness is organized in representation space. We find that LLMs separate literal and figurative usage in early layers, and that mid-to-late layers compress concreteness into a one-dimensional direction that is consistent across models. Finally, we show that this geometric structure is practically useful: a single concreteness direction supports efficient figurative-language classification and enables training-free steering of generation toward more literal or more figurative rewrites.

</details>


### [449] [Reasoning Models Know What's Important, and Encode It in Their Activations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18307)
*Yaniv Nikankin,Martin Tutek,Tomer Ashuach,Jonathan Rosenfeld,Yonatan Belinkov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 语言模型通过内部激活而非表面token能更好地识别推理链中关键步骤的重要性，模型在生成后续步骤前就已编码了重要性表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究语言模型在复杂任务推理中如何确定哪些步骤是关键的，以及这种重要性判断是基于模型内部表示还是推理链的表面特征。

Method: 通过训练探针（probes）分析模型激活，预测推理步骤的重要性，并与基于token的表面特征方法进行比较。

Result: 模型激活比token包含更多识别重要推理步骤的信息；模型在生成后续步骤前就已编码重要性表示；这种表示具有跨模型泛化性、跨层分布性，且与表面特征（如位置、长度）无关。

Conclusion: 分析模型内部激活能揭示表面方法无法捕捉的推理机制，表明推理分析应深入模型内部而非仅关注表面特征。

Abstract: Language models often solve complex tasks by generating long reasoning chains, consisting of many steps with varying importance. While some steps are crucial for generating the final answer, others are removable. Determining which steps matter most, and why, remains an open question central to understanding how models process reasoning. We investigate if this question is best approached through model internals or through tokens of the reasoning chain itself. We find that model activations contain more information than tokens for identifying important reasoning steps. Crucially, by training probes on model activations to predict importance, we show that models encode an internal representation of step importance, even prior to the generation of subsequent steps. This internal representation of importance generalizes across models, is distributed across layers, and does not correlate with surface-level features, such as a step's relative position or its length. Our findings suggest that analyzing activations can reveal aspects of reasoning that surface-level approaches fundamentally miss, indicating that reasoning analyses should look into model internals.

</details>


### [450] [On the Importance and Evaluation of Narrativity in Natural Language AI Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18311)
*Mateusz Cedro,David Martens*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出将可解释AI（XAI）的解释以叙事形式呈现，定义了叙事的四个关键属性，并开发了七个自动评估指标来衡量解释的叙事质量，超越了传统的NLP指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前XAI解释方法大多生成静态特征重要性列表，虽然能显示什么因素影响预测，但无法解释为什么会产生这样的预测结果。现有基于自然语言生成的XAI方法主要产生特征重要性列表，缺乏解释性的叙事结构。

Method: 借鉴社会科学和语言学的见解，提出XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现，定义了叙事的四个关键属性：连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性和词汇多样性。开发了七个自动评估指标来量化解释的叙事质量，并在六个数据集上对最先进的解释生成方法进行基准测试。

Result: 研究表明，仅基于词元概率或词频的标准NLP指标无法捕捉叙事属性，可能被无解释内容的同义反复文本匹配或超越。提出的七个指标能更可靠地区分描述性解释和叙事性解释。还提出了问题无关的XAI叙事生成规则。

Conclusion: XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现以增强人类理解，提出的叙事质量评估指标优于传统NLP指标，为生成更具解释性的XAI叙事提供了方法论基础。

Abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to make the behaviour of machine learning models interpretable, yet many explanation methods remain difficult to understand. The integration of Natural Language Generation into XAI aims to deliver explanations in textual form, making them more accessible to practitioners. Current approaches, however, largely yield static lists of feature importances. Although such explanations indicate what influences the prediction, they do not explain why the prediction occurs. In this study, we draw on insights from social sciences and linguistics, and argue that XAI explanations should be presented in the form of narratives. Narrative explanations support human understanding through four defining properties: continuous structure, cause-effect mechanisms, linguistic fluency, and lexical diversity. We show that standard Natural Language Processing (NLP) metrics based solely on token probability or word frequency fail to capture these properties and can be matched or exceeded by tautological text that conveys no explanatory content. To address this issue, we propose seven automatic metrics that quantify the narrative quality of explanations along the four identified dimensions. We benchmark current state-of-the-art explanation generation methods on six datasets and show that the proposed metrics separate descriptive from narrative explanations more reliably than standard NLP metrics. Finally, to further advance the field, we propose a set of problem-agnostic XAI Narrative generation rules for producing natural language XAI explanations, so that the resulting XAI Narratives exhibit stronger narrative properties and align with the findings from the linguistic and social science literature.

</details>


### [451] [FregeLogic at SemEval 2026 Task 11: A Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Content-Robust Syllogistic Validity Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18328)
*Adewale Akinfaderin,Nafi Diallo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FregeLogic是一个神经符号混合系统，结合了5个LLM分类器与Z3 SMT求解器，用于解决三段论有效性预测任务，通过形式逻辑仲裁减少内容偏见对预测的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决三段论有效性预测中内容偏见问题，即现实世界的可信度干扰逻辑判断。当LLM在集成中产生分歧时，通常表明存在内容偏见错误，需要通过形式逻辑方法进行仲裁。

Method: 1. 集成5个LLM分类器（Llama 4 Maverick、Llama 4 Scout、Qwen3-32B），采用不同提示策略；2. 当LLM集成出现分歧时，使用Z3 SMT求解器作为形式逻辑仲裁器；3. 采用结构化输出API调用提取Z3表达式；4. 使用亚里士多德编码和存在公理验证任务标注。

Result: 在5折交叉验证（N=960）中达到94.3%准确率，内容效应为2.85，综合得分为41.88。相比纯集成方法，综合得分提高2.76分（39.12），准确率提升0.9%，内容效应降低16%（3.39到2.85）。Z3提取失败率从约22%降至接近零。

Conclusion: 针对性的神经符号集成方法，在集成共识最低时应用形式方法，可以有效提高该任务使用的准确率加内容效应综合指标。结构化输出API调用显著提高了Z3提取的可靠性。

Abstract: We present FregeLogic, a hybrid neuro-symbolic system for SemEval-2026 Task 11 (Subtask 1), which addresses syllogistic validity prediction while reducing content effects on predictions. Our approach combines an ensemble of five LLM classifiers, spanning three open-weights models (Llama 4 Maverick, Llama 4 Scout, and Qwen3-32B) paired with varied prompting strategies, with a Z3 SMT solver that serves as a formal logic tiebreaker. The central hypothesis is that LLM disagreement within the ensemble signals likely content-biased errors, where real-world believability interferes with logical judgment. By deferring to Z3's structurally-grounded formal verification on these disputed cases, our system achieves 94.3% accuracy with a content effect of 2.85 and a combined score of 41.88 in nested 5-fold cross-validation on the dataset (N=960). This represents a 2.76-point improvement in combined score over the pure ensemble (39.12), with a 0.9% accuracy gain, driven by a 16% reduction in content effect (3.39 to 2.85). Adopting structured-output API calls for Z3 extraction reduced failure rates from ~22% to near zero, and an Aristotelian encoding with existence axioms was validated against task annotations. Our results suggest that targeted neuro-symbolic integration, applying formal methods precisely where ensemble consensus is lowest, can improve the combined accuracy-plus-content-effect metric used by this task.

</details>


### [452] [Multilingual Training and Evaluation Resources for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18347)
*Daniela Baiamonte,Elena Fano,Matteo Gabburo,Stefano Simonazzi,Leonardo Rigutini,Andrea Zugarini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究构建了首个面向欧洲五国语言（英、法、德、意、西）的多语言多模态训练数据集Multi-PixMo和评估基准，通过再生-翻译范式解决VLM发展中英语中心化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）发展严重依赖英语，存在两个主要局限：1）缺乏多语言多模态训练数据集；2）缺少跨语言的全面评估基准。这限制了VLMs在全球范围内的应用和发展。

Method: 采用再生-翻译范式：1）通过许可模型再生Pixmo现有数据集构建训练语料Multi-PixMo；2）翻译主流英文评估数据集（MMbench、ScienceQA等）构建多语言评估基准；3）通过人工标注和定量分析验证资源质量。

Result: 1）构建了高质量的多语言训练数据集和评估基准；2）人工分析显示资源质量高，标注者间一致性良好；3）消融实验证明多语言训练数据对非英语基准有显著提升，同时对英语也有正向迁移效果。

Conclusion: 多语言多模态训练数据对VLMs在非英语任务上的性能有显著提升，且不会损害英语能力。该研究为多语言VLMs发展提供了重要资源和基准，推动了该领域的全球化发展。

Abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieved rapid progress in the recent years. However, despite their growth, VLMs development is heavily grounded on English, leading to two main limitations: (i) the lack of multilingual and multimodal datasets for training, and (ii) the scarcity of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks across languages. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing a new comprehensive suite of resources for VLMs training and evaluation spanning five European languages (English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish). We adopt a regeneration-translation paradigm that produces high-quality cross-lingual resources by combining curated synthetic generation and manual annotation. Specifically, we build Multi-PixMo, a training corpus obtained regenerating examples from Pixmo pre-existing datasets with permissively licensed models: PixMo-Cap, PixMo-AskModelAnything, and CoSyn-400k. On the evaluation side, we construct a set of multilingual benchmarks derived translating widely used English datasets (MMbench, ScienceQA, MME, POPE, AI2D). We assess the quality of these resources through qualitative and quantitative human analyses, measuring inter-annotator agreement. Additionally, we perform ablation studies to demonstrate the impact of multilingual data, with respect to English only, in VLMs training. Experiments, comprising 3 different models show that using multilingual, multimodal examples for training VLMs aids is consistently beneficial on non-English benchmarks, with positive transfer to English as well.

</details>


### [453] [HiGMem: A Hierarchical and LLM-Guided Memory System for Long-Term Conversational Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18349)
*Shuqi Cao,Jingyi He,Fei Tan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: HiGMem提出了一种层次化LLM引导的记忆系统，通过事件摘要作为语义锚点来预测哪些对话轮次值得阅读，从而减少检索开销并提高证据质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有记忆系统（包括层次化系统）主要依赖向量相似性进行检索，导致证据集臃肿：添加许多表面相似的对话轮次对召回率提升有限，但会降低检索精度、增加答案阶段的上下文成本，并使检索到的记忆更难检查和管理。

Method: 提出HiGMem（Hierarchical and LLM-Guided Memory System），一个两级事件-轮次记忆系统，允许LLM使用事件摘要作为语义锚点来预测哪些相关轮次值得阅读。模型先检查高层事件摘要，然后聚焦于较小的潜在有用轮次集合。

Result: 在LoCoMo10基准测试中，HiGMem在五个问题类别中的四个取得了最佳F1分数，对抗性F1从A-Mem的0.54提升到0.78，同时检索的轮次数量减少了一个数量级。

Conclusion: HiGMem通过LLM引导的推理提供简洁可靠的证据集，避免了向量检索的过高检索开销，为长期对话LLM代理提供了更有效的记忆系统。

Abstract: Long-term conversational large language model (LLM) agents require memory systems that can recover relevant evidence from historical interactions without overwhelming the answer stage with irrelevant context. However, existing memory systems, including hierarchical ones, still often rely solely on vector similarity for retrieval. It tends to produce bloated evidence sets: adding many superficially similar dialogue turns yields little additional recall, but lowers retrieval precision, increases answer-stage context cost, and makes retrieved memories harder to inspect and manage. To address this, we propose HiGMem (Hierarchical and LLM-Guided Memory System), a two-level event-turn memory system that allows LLMs to use event summaries as semantic anchors to predict which related turns are worth reading. This allows the model to inspect high-level event summaries first and then focus on a smaller set of potentially useful turns, providing a concise and reliable evidence set through reasoning, while avoiding the retrieval overhead that would be excessively high compared to vector retrieval. On the LoCoMo10 benchmark, HiGMem achieves the best F1 on four of five question categories and improves adversarial F1 from 0.54 to 0.78 over A-Mem, while retrieving an order of magnitude fewer turns. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZeroLoss-Lab/HiGMem.

</details>


### [454] [PRISMA: Preference-Reinforced Self-Training Approach for Interpretable Emotionally Intelligent Negotiation Dialogues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18354)
*Prajwal Vijay Kajare,Priyanshu Priya,Bikash Santra,Asif Ekbal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PRISMA是一个可解释的情感智能谈判对话系统，通过ENS-CoT推理机制和DPO增强训练，在求职面试和资源分配两个领域生成情感感知的谈判响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感在谈判结果中起关键作用，影响信任、合作和长期关系。开发能够识别并战略性地响应情感的谈判对话系统对于创建更有效的人本交互至关重要，而可解释性对于培养可靠性和建立融洽关系同样重要。

Method: 提出情感感知谈判策略链式思维（ENS-CoT）推理机制，模仿人类谈判的情感感知、理解、使用和管理过程。创建JobNego和ResNego两个新数据集，并通过结合自训练和直接偏好优化（DPO）来开发PRISMA系统。

Result: 在JobNego和ResNego数据集上的自动和人工评估表明，PRISMA显著增强了可解释性，生成适当的情感感知响应，同时提高了整体谈判效果。

Conclusion: PRISMA是一个有效的可解释情感智能谈判对话系统，通过ENS-CoT机制和DPO增强训练，在情感感知响应生成和谈判效果方面表现出色，为构建更可靠、有效的人机谈判交互提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Emotion plays a pivotal role in shaping negotiation outcomes, influencing trust, cooperation, and long-term relationships. Developing negotiation dialog systems that can recognize and respond strategically to emotions is, therefore, essential to create more effective human-centered interactions. Beyond generating emotionally appropriate responses, interpretability - understanding how a system generates a particular emotion-aware response, is critical for fostering reliability and building rapport. Driven by these aspects, in this work, we introduce PRISMA, an interpretable emotionally intelligent negotiation dialogue system targeting two application domains, viz. job interviews and resource allocation. To enable interpretability, we propose an Emotion-aware Negotiation Strategy-informed Chain-of-Thought (ENS-CoT) reasoning mechanism, which mimics human negotiation by perceiving, understanding, using, and managing emotions. Leveraging ENS-CoT, we curate two new datasets: JobNego (for job interview negotiation) and ResNego (for resource allocation negotiation). We then leverage these datasets to develop PRISMA by augmenting self-training with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), guiding agents toward more accurate, interpretable, and emotionally appropriate negotiation responses. Automatic and human evaluation on JobNego and ResNego datasets demonstrate that PRISMA substantially enhances interpretability and generates appropriate emotion-aware responses, while improving overall negotiation effectiveness.

</details>


### [455] [ComPASS: Towards Personalized Agentic Social Support via Tool-Augmented Companionship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18356)
*Zhaopei Huang,Yanfeng Jia,Jiayi Zhao,Xinjie Zhang,Wenxuan Wang,Qin Jin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ComPASS：首个面向LLM智能体的个性化社交支持基准，通过工具增强实现实质性情感支持，显著提升响应质量


<details>
