  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感对话系统局限于简单的共情回应，缺乏多样化和实质性的支持能力，无法满足不同用户和情境下的多样化需求

Method: 1) 设计12个用户中心工具模拟多媒体应用，覆盖人机交互中的各类社交支持行为；2) 构建首个个性化社交支持基准ComPASS-Bench；3) 基于工具使用记录微调Qwen3-8B模型得到ComPASS-Qwen

Result: 工具增强的响应比直接生成共情对话表现更好；ComPASS-Qwen相比基础模型有显著提升，性能可与多个大型模型相媲美；LLM能高成功率生成有效工具调用请求，但最终响应质量仍有差距

Conclusion: 通过工具增强实现实质性社交支持是可行的，ComPASS框架为开发富有同情心的交互系统提供了新范式，显著提升了情感支持的多样性和有效性

Abstract: Developing compassionate interactive systems requires agents to not only understand user emotions but also provide diverse, substantive support. While recent works explore empathetic dialogue generation, they remain limited in response form and content, struggling to satisfy diverse needs across users and contexts. To address this, we explore empowering agents with external tools to execute diverse actions. Grounded in the psychological concept of "social support", this paradigm delivers substantive, human-like companionship. Specifically, we first design a dozen user-centric tools simulating various multimedia applications, which can cover different types of social support behaviors in human-agent interaction scenarios. We then construct ComPASS-Bench, the first personalized social support benchmark for LLM-based agents, via multi-step automated synthesis and manual refinement. Based on ComPASS-Bench, we further synthesize tool use records to fine-tune the Qwen3-8B model, yielding a task-specific ComPASS-Qwen. Comprehensive evaluations across two settings reveal that while the evaluated LLMs can generate valid tool-calling requests with high success rates, significant gaps remain in final response quality. Moreover, tool-augmented responses achieve better overall performance than directly producing conversational empathy. Notably, our trained ComPASS-Qwen demonstrates substantial improvements over its base model, achieving comparable performance to several large-scale models. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hzp3517/ComPASS.

</details>


### [456] [ArbGraph: Conflict-Aware Evidence Arbitration for Reliable Long-Form Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18362)
*Qingying Niu,Yuhao Wang,Ruiyang Ren,Bohui Fang,Wayne Xin Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ArbGraph是一个用于长文本检索增强生成（RAG）的预生成证据仲裁框架，通过构建冲突感知的证据图并传播可信度信号，在生成前解决事实冲突，从而提高事实一致性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前RAG在长文本场景中不可靠，因为检索到的证据存在噪声或矛盾，导致难以保持事实一致性。现有方法主要关注检索扩展或生成过程中的验证，将冲突解决与生成过程纠缠在一起。

Method: ArbGraph将检索到的文档分解为原子主张，组织成具有明确支持和矛盾关系的冲突感知证据图。在此基础上引入强度驱动的迭代仲裁机制，通过证据交互传播可信度信号，在最终生成前抑制不可靠和不一致的主张。

Result: 在LongFact和RAGChecker两个长文本RAG基准测试中，使用多个大语言模型骨干的实验结果表明，ArbGraph持续提高了事实召回率和信息密度，同时减少了幻觉和对检索噪声的敏感性。在冲突或模糊证据情况下效果尤为明显。

Conclusion: ArbGraph通过将证据验证与文本生成分离，为下游长文本生成提供连贯的证据基础，证明了证据级冲突解决对提高长文本RAG可靠性的有效性。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) remains unreliable in long-form settings, where retrieved evidence is noisy or contradictory, making it difficult for RAG pipelines to maintain factual consistency. Existing approaches focus on retrieval expansion or verification during generation, leaving conflict resolution entangled with generation. To address this limitation, we propose ArbGraph, a framework for pre-generation evidence arbitration in long-form RAG that explicitly resolves factual conflicts. ArbGraph decomposes retrieved documents into atomic claims and organizes them into a conflict-aware evidence graph with explicit support and contradiction relations. On top of this graph, we introduce an intensity-driven iterative arbitration mechanism that propagates credibility signals through evidence interactions, enabling the system to suppress unreliable and inconsistent claims before final generation. In this way, ArbGraph separates evidence validation from text generation and provides a coherent evidence foundation for downstream long-form generation. We evaluate ArbGraph on two widely used long-form RAG benchmarks, LongFact and RAGChecker, using multiple large language model backbones. Experimental results show that ArbGraph consistently improves factual recall and information density while reducing hallucinations and sensitivity to retrieval noise. Additional analyses show that these gains are evident under conflicting or ambiguous evidence, highlighting the effectiveness of evidence-level conflict resolution for improving the reliability of long-form RAG. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/1212Judy/ArbGraph.

</details>


### [457] [IceBreaker for Conversational Agents: Breaking the First-Message Barrier with Personalized Starters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18375)
*Hongwei Zheng,Weiqi Wu,Zhengjia Wang,Guanyu Jiang,Haoming Li,Tianyu Wu,Yongchun Zhu,Jingwu Chen,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出IceBreaker系统，解决对话启动阶段的冷启动问题，通过生成个性化开场白引导用户进入对话，在真实产品中显著提升用户活跃度和点击率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话系统主要关注对话过程中的激活，但忽略了对话启动阶段的瓶颈。用户在对话开始时可能有模糊需求但没有明确查询意图，形成"首消息障碍"，导致对话无法开始。需要解决冷启动时刻的对话引导问题。

Method: 提出IceBreaker框架，将人类破冰过程建模为两步握手：(1) 通过共振感知兴趣提取从会话摘要中捕捉触发兴趣，引发共鸣；(2) 通过交互导向的开场白生成，结合个性化偏好对齐和自我强化循环优化，最大化用户参与度。

Result: 在世界上最大的对话代理产品之一进行的在线A/B测试显示，IceBreaker将用户活跃天数提升+0.184%，点击率提升+9.425%，并已在生产环境中部署。

Conclusion: IceBreaker成功解决了对话启动阶段的冷启动问题，通过生成个性化开场白有效引导用户进入对话，显著提升了用户参与度和产品效果，为对话系统的主动化发展提供了新方向。

Abstract: Conversational agents, such as ChatGPT and Doubao, have become essential daily assistants for billions of users. To further enhance engagement, these systems are evolving from passive responders to proactive companions. However, existing efforts focus on activation within ongoing dialogues, while overlooking a key real-world bottleneck. In the conversation initiation stage, users may have a vague need but no explicit query intent, creating a first-message barrier where the conversation holds before it begins. To overcome this, we introduce Conversation Starter Generation: generating personalized starters to guide users into conversation. However, unlike in-conversation stages where immediate context guides the response, initiation must operate in a cold-start moment without explicit user intent. To pioneer in this direction, we present IceBreaker that frames human ice-breaking as a two-step handshake: (i) evoke resonance via Resonance-Aware Interest Distillation from session summaries to capture trigger interests, and (ii) stimulate interaction via Interaction-Oriented Starter Generation, optimized with personalized preference alignment and a self-reinforced loop to maximize engagement. Online A/B tests on one of the world's largest conversational agent products show that IceBreaker improves user active days by +0.184% and click-through rate by +9.425%, and has been deployed in production.

</details>


### [458] [Understanding the Prompt Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18389)
*Yang Liu,Chenhui Chu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文通过将大语言模型视为多元函数并进行一阶泰勒展开，分析了意义保留提示、梯度与模型下一个token对数概率之间的关系，揭示了LLM对同义提示高度敏感的原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的提示敏感性（输出对输入措辞的强烈依赖性）引发了用户对其稳定性和可靠性的担忧。需要理解为什么当前LLM对相同含义的提示如此敏感。

Method: 将LLM视为多元函数并进行一阶泰勒展开，使用柯西-施瓦茨不等式推导对数概率差异的上界。分析意义保留提示的梯度、对数概率关系，并与现有PromptSensiScore指标对比。

Result: 发现LLM不会像小神经网络那样内部聚类相似输入，而是分散它们，导致意义保留提示间的对数概率差异上界过高且难以有效降至0。提示模板通常比问题本身对logits影响更大。

Conclusion: 研究结果为理解LLM提示敏感性提供了理论解释，揭示了哪些类型的意义保留提示变体更容易引入敏感性风险，为理解LLM的提示敏感性提供了关键证据。

Abstract: Prompt sensitivity, which refers to how strongly the output of a large language model (LLM) depends on the exact wording of its input prompt, raises concerns among users about the LLM's stability and reliability. In this work, we consider LLMs as multivariate functions and perform a first-order Taylor expansion, thereby analyzing the relationship between meaning-preserving prompts, their gradients, and the log probabilities of the model's next token. We derive an upper bound on the difference between log probabilities using the Cauchy-Schwarz inequality. We show that LLMs do not internally cluster similar inputs like smaller neural networks do, but instead disperse them. This dispersing behavior leads to an excessively high upper bound on the difference of log probabilities between two meaning-preserving prompts, making it difficult to effectively reduce to 0. In our analysis, we also show which types of meaning-preserving prompt variants are more likely to introduce prompt sensitivity risks in LLMs. In addition, we demonstrate that the upper bound is strongly correlated with an existing prompt sensitivity metric, PromptSensiScore. Moreover, by analyzing the logit variance, we find that prompt templates typically exert a greater influence on logits than the questions themselves. Overall, our results provide a general interpretation for why current LLMs can be highly sensitive to prompts with the same meaning, offering crucial evidence for understanding the prompt sensitivity of LLMs. Code for experiments is available at https://github.com/ku-nlp/Understanding_the_Prompt_Sensitivity.

</details>


### [459] [River-LLM: Large Language Model Seamless Exit Based on KV Share](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18396)
*Yingtao Shen,An Zou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: River-LLM是一个无需训练的训练框架，通过KV共享退出机制解决解码器架构中早期退出的KV缓存缺失问题，实现1.71-2.16倍的实际加速，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽然性能优异，但推理延迟高。早期退出是加速推理的有效方法，但在解码器架构中，由于跳过层无法为后续token提供必要的历史状态（KV缓存缺失问题），导致效率严重受限。现有解决方案如重新计算或掩码要么引入显著延迟开销，要么造成严重精度损失。

Method: 提出River-LLM训练框架：1）引入轻量级KV共享退出机制，使主干网络缺失的KV缓存能在退出过程中自然生成和保留，无需昂贵的恢复操作；2）利用解码器块内的状态转移相似性预测累积KV误差，指导精确的退出决策。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上的广泛实验表明，River-LLM实现了1.71到2.16倍的实际加速，同时保持高生成质量。

Conclusion: River-LLM有效解决了早期退出中的KV缓存缺失瓶颈，在解码器架构中实现了理论层减少与实际墙钟加速之间的桥梁，为大语言模型的高效推理提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance across diverse domains but are increasingly constrained by high inference latency. Early Exit has emerged as a promising solution to accelerate inference by dynamically bypassing redundant layers. However, in decoder-only architectures, the efficiency of Early Exit is severely bottlenecked by the KV Cache Absence problem, where skipped layers fail to provide the necessary historical states for subsequent tokens. Existing solutions, such as recomputation or masking, either introduce significant latency overhead or incur severe precision loss, failing to bridge the gap between theoretical layer reduction and practical wall-clock speedup. In this paper, we propose River-LLM, a training-free framework that enables seamless token-level Early Exit. River-LLM introduces a lightweight KV-Shared Exit River that allows the backbone's missing KV cache to be naturally generated and preserved during the exit process, eliminating the need for costly recovery operations. Furthermore, we utilize state transition similarity within decoder blocks to predict cumulative KV errors and guide precise exit decisions. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks demonstrate that River-LLM achieves 1.71 to 2.16 times of practical speedup while maintaining high generation quality.

</details>


### [460] [AlphaContext: An Evolutionary Tree-based Psychometric Context Generator for Creativity Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18398)
*Yixuan Wang,Yue Huang,Hong Qian,Yunzhao Wei,Yifei Ding,Wenkai Wang,Zhi Liu,Zhongjing Huang,Aimin Zhou,Jiajun Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AlphaContext：基于进化树的创造力评估心理测量情境生成器，通过分层规划、MCTS生成和进化优化，提升情境质量与多样性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创造力在LLM时代成为核心能力，需要科学有效的评估工具。现有基于LLM的情境生成器存在评估线索不足、叙事连贯性差、风格多样性有限、对创造性思维支持不足等问题，高质量专家设计情境稀缺。

Method: 1. HyperTree Outline Planner：将专家设计的大纲形式化为规则引导的超树，进行自上而下的分层规划
2. MCTS-based Context Generator：通过蒙特卡洛树搜索填充大纲，平衡全局结构和局部质量
3. Evolutionary Context Optimizer：使用MAP-Elites进化情境，通过重复更新生态位精英共同提升多样性和质量
4. Assessment-Guided Evolution Refiner：模拟多样化风格的虚拟参与者，回收弱情境进行进一步进化

Result: AlphaContext在6个质量指标上平均比竞争方法提升8%

Conclusion: AlphaContext通过进化树方法有效解决了创造力评估情境生成中的关键挑战，显著提升了情境质量和多样性，为创造力评估提供了高质量的心理测量工具。

Abstract: Creativity has become a core competence in the era of LLMs and human-AI collaboration, underpinning innovation in real-world problem solving. Crucially, the systematic improvement of creativity necessitates scientifically valid assessment instruments. Psychometric research recognizes context-based assessment as an effective way to measure creative thinking. However, high-quality expert-designed contexts remain scarce. Existing LLM-based generators often struggle with insufficient assessment cues, weak narrative coherence, limited stylistic diversity, and poor support for creative thinking. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaContext, an evolutionary tree-based psychometric context generator for creativity assessment. First, the HyperTree Outline Planner formalizes expert-designed outlining as a rule-guided hypertree and performs top-down hierarchical planning. The MCTS-based Context Generator fills the outline via MCTS to balance global structure and local quality. Then, the Evolutionary Context Optimizer evolves contexts with MAP-Elites by repeatedly updating niche elites to jointly improve diversity and quality. Finally, the Assessment-Guided Evolution Refiner simulates virtual participants with diverse styles and recycles weak contexts for further evolution. Experiments show that AlphaContext yields an average improvement of 8% over competitive methods across 6 quality metrics.

</details>


### [461] [StepPO: Step-Aligned Policy Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18401)
*Daoyu Wang,Qingchuan Li,Mingyue Cheng,Jie Ouyang,Shuo Yu,Qi Liu,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: StepPO提出将传统token级别的强化学习范式升级为step级别的Agentic RL，认为step（而非token）才是LLM智能体的合适动作表示，并提出了step级别的信用分配方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着通用智能体系统追求更宏大目标，对基础大语言模型的智能体能力要求越来越高。传统的token级别强化学习范式（如RLHF）无法有效应对多轮交互、延迟稀疏奖励、长可变上下文等智能体训练新挑战。

Method: 提出step级别的Agentic RL范式：1）将传统token级别的马尔可夫决策过程升级为step级别MDP；2）将step而非token视为LLM智能体的合适动作表示；3）提出step级别的信用分配作为优化对应；4）讨论了实现step级别Agentic RL的关键系统设计。

Result: 初步实验为这一视角的有效性提供了初步证据，表明step对齐的step级别范式有助于理解智能体行为并推进LLM向更强的通用智能体能力发展。

Conclusion: StepPO提出的step级别Agentic RL范式为智能体强化学习社区提供了理解智能体行为的有用视角，有助于推动LLM发展更强的通用智能体能力，代表了从token中心到step中心的重要范式转变。

Abstract: General agents have given rise to phenomenal applications such as OpenClaw and Claude Code. As these agent systems (a.k.a. Harnesses) strive for bolder goals, they demand increasingly stronger agentic capabilities from foundation Large Language Models (LLMs). Agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) is emerging as a central post-training paradigm for empowering LLMs with these capabilities and is playing an increasingly pivotal role in agent training. Unlike single-turn token-level alignment or reasoning enhancement, as in RLHF and RLVR, Agentic RL targets multi-turn interactive settings, where the goal is to optimize core agentic capabilities such as decision making and tool use while addressing new challenges including delayed and sparse rewards, as well as long and variable context. As a result, the token-centric modeling and optimization paradigm inherited from traditional LLM RL is becoming increasingly inadequate for capturing real LLM agent behavior. In this paper, we present StepPO as a position on step-level Agentic RL. We argue that the conventional token-level Markov Decision Process (MDP) should be advanced to a step-level MDP formulation, and that the step, rather than the token, should be regarded as the proper action representation for LLM agents. We then propose step-level credit assignment as the natural optimization counterpart of this formulation, thereby aligning policy optimization and reward propagation with the granularity of agent decisions. Finally, we discuss the key systems designs required to realize step-level Agentic RL in practice and preliminary experiments provide initial evidence for the effectiveness of this perspective. We hope that the step-aligned, step-level paradigm embodied in StepPO offers the Agentic RL community a useful lens for understanding agent behavior and helps advance LLMs toward stronger general-agent capabilities.

</details>


### [462] [BhashaSutra: A Task-Centric Unified Survey of Indian NLP Datasets, Corpora, and Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18423)
*Raghvendra Kumar,Devankar Raj,Sriparna Saha*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 首份针对印度语言NLP资源的统一调查，涵盖200+数据集、50+基准测试和100+模型工具，分析趋势并识别数据稀疏、语言覆盖不均等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度拥有22种官方语言和数百种边缘化方言，NLP资源增长迅速，但缺乏专门针对印度语言的综合调查。现有综述要么关注少数高资源语言，要么将印度语言置于更广泛的多语言环境中，无法充分覆盖低资源和多样化的语言变体。

Method: 收集并系统整理印度语言NLP资源，包括200多个数据集、50多个基准测试以及100多个模型、工具和系统，涵盖文本、语音、多模态和文化相关任务。按语言现象、领域和模态组织资源，分析标注、评估和模型设计趋势。

Result: 创建了首个统一的印度语言NLP资源调查，揭示了数据稀疏、语言覆盖不均、文字多样性、文化和领域泛化有限等持续挑战。为印度语言生态系统的NLP研究提供了系统化的资源基础。

Conclusion: 这项调查为印度语言生态系统中公平、文化基础扎实且可扩展的NLP研究提供了统一的基础框架，有助于推动该领域更均衡的发展。

Abstract: India's linguistic landscape, spanning 22 scheduled languages and hundreds of marginalized dialects, has driven rapid growth in NLP datasets, benchmarks, and pretrained models. However, no dedicated survey consolidates resources developed specifically for Indian languages. Existing reviews either focus on a few high-resource languages or subsume Indian languages within broader multilingual settings, limiting coverage of low-resource and culturally diverse varieties. To address this gap, we present the first unified survey of Indian NLP resources, covering 200+ datasets, 50+ benchmarks, and 100+ models, tools, and systems across text, speech, multimodal, and culturally grounded tasks. We organize resources by linguistic phenomena, domains, and modalities; analyze trends in annotation, evaluation, and model design; and identify persistent challenges such as data sparsity, uneven language coverage, script diversity, and limited cultural and domain generalization. This survey offers a consolidated foundation for equitable, culturally grounded, and scalable NLP research in the Indian linguistic ecosystem.

</details>


### [463] [Adversarial Humanities Benchmark: Results on Stylistic Robustness in Frontier Model Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18487)
*Marcello Galisai,Susanna Cifani,Francesco Giarrusso,Piercosma Bisconti,Matteo Prandi,Federico Pierucci,Federico Sartore,Daniele Nardi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AHB基准测试显示，当前AI安全技术对风格转换攻击缺乏鲁棒性，原始攻击成功率仅3.84%，而经过人文学科风格转换后成功率提升至55.75%，表明安全机制泛化能力薄弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估模型安全拒绝机制在面对风格转换攻击时的鲁棒性，测试当前安全技术是否能真正理解"非恶意"原则，而不仅仅是识别特定形式的恶意提示。

Method: 基于MLCommons AILuminate的有害任务，通过人文学科风格转换（如诗歌、故事等形式）重写相同目标但保留恶意意图，构建对抗性人文学科基准测试，测试31个前沿模型。

Result: 原始攻击成功率仅3.84%，而风格转换后攻击成功率大幅提升至36.8%-65.0%，整体成功率达55.75%。CBRN（化学、生物、放射性和核武器）类别风险最高。

Conclusion: 当前安全技术缺乏风格鲁棒性，对"非恶意"原则的深度理解仍是前沿模型安全的核心未解问题，安全机制泛化能力薄弱。

Abstract: The Adversarial Humanities Benchmark (AHB) evaluates whether model safety refusals survive a shift away from familiar harmful prompt forms. Starting from harmful tasks drawn from MLCommons AILuminate, the benchmark rewrites the same objectives through humanities-style transformations while preserving intent. This extends literature on Adversarial Poetry and Adversarial Tales from single jailbreak operators to a broader benchmark family of stylistic obfuscation and goal concealment. In the benchmark results reported here, the original attacks record 3.84% attack success rate (ASR), while transformed methods range from 36.8% to 65.0%, yielding 55.75% overall ASR across 31 frontier models. Under a European Union AI Act Code-of-Practice-inspired systemic-risk lens, Chemical, biological, radiological and nuclear (CBRN) is the highest bucket. Taken together, this lack of stylistic robustness suggests that current safety techniques suffer from weak generalization: deep understanding of 'non-maleficence' remains a central unresolved problem in frontier model safety.

</details>


### [464] [LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18490)
*Samar M. Magdy,Fakhraddin Alwajih,Abdellah El Mekki,Wesam El-Sayed,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LQM是一个针对多语言翻译评估的层次化错误分类框架，特别关注方言和文化特定错误，在阿拉伯语方言翻译中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MT评估框架（包括自动指标和MQM等人文评估方案）大多是语言无关的，但往往无法捕捉双语语言（如阿拉伯语）中的方言和文化特定错误，这些错误源于语言变体、内容覆盖和语用适当性等方面的不匹配，而不仅仅是表面形式。

Method: 提出了LQM：基于语言学的多维质量指标，这是一个层次化错误分类法，通过六个语言学基础层次（社会语言学、语用学、语义学、形态句法学、正字法、文字学）来诊断MT错误。构建了包含3,850个句子的双向平行语料库，涵盖七种阿拉伯语方言，评估了六种LLM的零样本表现，并使用LQM进行了专家级跨度标注。

Result: 产生了6,113个标注错误跨度和3,495个独特错误句子，以及严重性加权的质量分数。同时使用自动指标（spBLEU）进行了补充分析。虽然主要在阿拉伯语上验证，但LQM是一个语言无关的框架，可以轻松应用于或适应其他语言。

Conclusion: LQM提供了一个全面的、语言学驱动的MT评估框架，特别适用于捕捉方言和文化特定错误，填补了现有评估方法的空白，并为多语言翻译质量评估提供了新的工具和数据集。

Abstract: Existing MT evaluation frameworks, including automatic metrics and human evaluation schemes such as Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM), are largely language-agnostic. However, they often fail to capture dialect- and culture-specific errors in diglossic languages (e.g., Arabic), where translation failures stem from mismatches in language variety, content coverage, and pragmatic appropriateness rather than surface form alone.We introduce LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for MT. LQM is a hierarchical error taxonomy for diagnosing MT errors through six linguistically grounded levels: sociolinguistics, pragmatics, semantics, morphosyntax, orthography, and graphetics (Figure 1). We construct a bidirectional parallel corpus of 3,850 sentences (550 per variety) spanning seven Arabic dialects (Egyptian, Emirati, Jordanian, Mauritanian, Moroccan, Palestinian, and Yemeni), derived from conversational, culturally rich content. We evaluate six LLMs in a zero-shot setting and conduct expert span-level human annotation using LQM, producing 6,113 labeled error spans across 3,495 unique erroneous sentences, along with severity-weighted quality scores. We complement this analysis with an automatic metric (spBLEU). Though validated here on Arabic, LQM is a language-agnostic framework designed to be easily applied to or adapted for other languages. LQM annotated errors data, prompts, and annotation guidelines are publicly available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT.

</details>


### [465] [MASS-RAG: Multi-Agent Synthesis Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18509)
*Xingchen Xiao,Heyan Huang,Runheng Liu,Jincheng Xie*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MASS-RAG：一种多智能体合成方法，通过角色专业化智能体处理检索证据，提升RAG在噪声、不完整或异构上下文中的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当检索到的上下文存在噪声、不完整或异构时，单一生成过程难以有效整合证据，需要更结构化的证据处理方式

Method: 提出MASS-RAG多智能体合成方法，使用专门角色智能体进行证据总结、证据提取和推理，通过专用合成阶段结合输出生成最终答案

Result: 在四个基准测试中，MASS-RAG始终优于强RAG基线，特别是在相关证据分布在多个检索上下文中的场景下表现突出

Conclusion: 多智能体结构化的证据处理方法能有效提升RAG系统在复杂检索场景下的性能，通过暴露多个中间证据视图实现更好的信息整合

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to incorporate external knowledge at inference time. However, when retrieved contexts are noisy, incomplete, or heterogeneous, a single generation process often struggles to reconcile evidence effectively. We propose \textbf{MASS-RAG}, a multi-agent synthesis approach to retrieval-augmented generation that structures evidence processing into multiple role-specialized agents. MASS-RAG applies distinct agents for evidence summarization, evidence extraction, and reasoning over retrieved documents, and combines their outputs through a dedicated synthesis stage to produce the final answer. This design exposes multiple intermediate evidence views, allowing the model to compare and integrate complementary information before answer generation. Experiments on four benchmarks show that MASS-RAG consistently improves performance over strong RAG baselines, particularly in settings where relevant evidence is distributed across retrieved contexts.

</details>


### [466] [Transition-Matrix Regularization for Next Dialogue Act Prediction in Counselling Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18539)
*Eric Rudolph,Philipp Steigerwald,Jens Albrecht*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出KL正则化方法，将语料库对话流统计融入下一对话行为预测，在德语咨询数据集上提升宏F1 9-42%，跨语言验证有效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何将经验性对话流统计信息整合到下一对话行为预测中，以改善对话系统的连贯性和自然性

Method: 提出KL正则化项，使预测的行为分布与语料库推导的转移模式对齐，在60类德语咨询分类法上使用5折交叉验证

Result: 宏F1相对提升9-42%（取决于编码器），显著改善对话流对齐，跨数据集验证显示改进可跨语言和咨询领域迁移

Conclusion: 轻量级话语流先验补充预训练编码器，尤其在细粒度、数据稀疏的对话任务中效果显著，对较弱基线模型提升更大

Abstract: This paper studies how empirical dialogue-flow statistics can be incorporated into Next Dialogue Act Prediction (NDAP). A KL regularization term is proposed that aligns predicted act distributions with corpus-derived transition patterns. Evaluated on a 60-class German counselling taxonomy using 5-fold cross-validation, this improves macro-F1 by 9--42% relative depending on encoder and substantially improves dialogue-flow alignment. Cross-dataset validation on HOPE suggests that improvements transfer across languages and counselling domains. In systematic ablations across pretrained encoders and architectures, the findings indicate that transition regularization provides consistent gains and disproportionately benefits weaker baseline models. The results suggest that lightweight discourse-flow priors complement pretrained encoders, especially in fine-grained, data-sparse dialogue tasks.

</details>


### [467] [GSQ: Highly-Accurate Low-Precision Scalar Quantization for LLMs via Gumbel-Softmax Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18556)
*Alireza Dadgarnia,Soroush Tabesh,Mahdi Nikdan,Michael Helcig,Eldar Kurtic,Dan Alistarh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GSQ是一种使用Gumbel-Softmax松弛优化的后训练标量量化方法，在2-3比特位宽下接近向量量化性能，同时保持标量量化的实现简单性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM量化方法存在两难：标量量化方法（如GPTQ、AWQ）实现简单但精度在3-4比特时达到瓶颈；向量/网格量化方法（如QTIP、GPTVQ）在低比特位宽下精度更高但实现复杂且难以扩展。研究目标是探索是否可以通过优化标量量化来缩小这一差距。

Method: GSQ使用Gumbel-Softmax松弛来联合学习每个坐标的网格分配和每组尺度。该方法将松弛的基数与目标比特位宽下的少量级别（如3-8个级别）相匹配，使松弛紧密且优化可行。采用对称标量网格和分组量化，完全兼容现有标量推理内核。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct模型上，GSQ在2和3比特位宽下基本填补了标量量化与QTIP前沿之间的差距。同时，GSQ能够扩展到万亿参数的混合专家模型（如Kimi-K2.5），而向量量化方法难以应用。

Conclusion: 通过精心优化的标量量化可以恢复大部分与向量量化方法的性能差距。GSQ在保持标量量化实现简单性和兼容性的同时，在低比特位宽下达到了接近向量量化的精度，并展示了良好的可扩展性。

Abstract: Weight quantization has become a standard tool for efficient LLM deployment, especially for local inference, where models are now routinely served at 2-3 bits per parameter. The state of the art is currently split into two sets of methods: simple scalar quantization techniques, such as GPTQ or AWQ, which are widely deployed but plateau in accuracy at 3-4 bits per parameter (bpp), and "second-generation" vector- or trellis-quantized methods, such as QTIP, GPTVQ and AQLM, which push the accuracy frontier at low bit-widths but are notoriously hard to implement and to scale, and have gained relatively less traction. In this paper, we ask whether this gap is fundamental, or whether a carefully optimized scalar quantizer can recover most of it. We answer in the affirmative, by introducing GSQ (Gumbel-Softmax Quantization), a post-training scalar quantization method which jointly learns the per-coordinate grid assignments and the per-group scales using a Gumbel-Softmax relaxation of the discrete grid. GSQ matches the cardinality of the relaxation to the small number of levels available in the target bit-width regime (e.g., 3-8 levels for ternary and 3 bpp, respectively), making the relaxation tight and the optimization tractable. Practically, on the standard Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct models, GSQ closes most of the gap between scalar quantization and the QTIP frontier at 2 and 3 bits, while using a symmetric scalar grid with group-wise quantization, and thus fully compatible with existing scalar inference kernels. We further show that GSQ scales to trillion-scale Mixture-of-Experts models such as Kimi-K2.5, where vector-quantized methods are difficult to apply.

</details>


### [468] [Dual Alignment Between Language Model Layers and Human Sentence Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18563)
*Tatsuki Kuribayashi,Alex Warstadt,Yohei Oseki,Ethan Gotlieb Wilcox*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 早期LLM层能有效建模常规句子处理，但在句法挑战性结构中低估人类认知努力；后期层表现更好但仍不足，揭示了人类句子处理的两种模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究发现早期LLM层的惊奇度能有效建模人类常规句子处理行为，但不确定这种优势是否适用于更具句法挑战性的结构，因为在这些结构中惊奇度通常低估人类认知努力。

Method: 探索LLM内部层以更好估计英语句法歧义处理中的人类认知努力；对比自然阅读与句法挑战性处理；研究使用浅层和深层层的概率更新测量方法。

Result: 在句法挑战性结构中，后期层比早期层能更好地估计人类认知努力，但仍低估人类数据；发现人类句子处理存在两种模式：自然阅读类似于LLM早期层的弱预测，句法挑战性处理需要更充分的情境化表征，更接近LLM后期层。

Conclusion: 人类句子处理存在两种不同模式，浅层和深层概率更新测量方法对单层惊奇度在阅读时间建模中具有互补优势，这为理解人类与语言模型处理机制差异提供了新视角。

Abstract: A recent study (Kuribayashi et al., 2025) has shown that human sentence processing behavior, typically measured on syntactically unchallenging constructions, can be effectively modeled using surprisal from early layers of large language models (LLMs). This raises the question of whether such advantages of internal layers extend to more syntactically challenging constructions, where surprisal has been reported to underestimate human cognitive effort. In this paper, we begin by exploring internal layers that better estimate human cognitive effort observed in syntactic ambiguity processing in English. Our experiments show that, in contrast to naturalistic reading, later layers better estimate such a cognitive effort, but still underestimate the human data. This dual alignment sheds light on different modes of sentence processing in humans and LMs: naturalistic reading employs a somewhat weak prediction akin to earlier layers of LMs, while syntactically challenging processing requires more fully-contextualized representations, better modeled by later layers of LMs. Motivated by these findings, we also explore several probability-update measures using shallow and deep layers of LMs, showing a complementary advantage to single-layer's surprisal in reading time modeling.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [469] [Governing the Agentic Enterprise: A Governance Maturity Model for Managing AI Agent Sprawl in Business Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16338)
*Vivek Acharya*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出企业AI代理治理成熟度模型(AAGMM)，解决AI代理无序扩张问题，通过五级框架和12个治理领域帮助企业实现有效治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业AI代理的快速采用导致治理危机，出现代理无序扩张问题。目前只有21%的企业有成熟的治理模型，40%的AI代理项目预计会因治理不足而失败。学术界缺乏连接治理能力与可衡量业务成果的正式治理成熟度模型。

Method: 提出AI代理治理成熟度模型(AAGMM)，包含五级框架和12个治理领域，基于NIST AI RMF和ISO/IEC 42001标准。同时提出代理扩张模式分类法（功能重复、影子代理、孤儿代理、权限蔓延、未监控委托链），每种模式都与可量化的业务成本模型关联。通过750次模拟运行在五个企业场景和五个治理成熟度级别进行验证。

Result: 结果显示不同治理成熟度级别之间存在统计学显著差异(p < 0.001，效应量d > 2.0)。第4-5级组织相比第1级：扩张指数降低94.3%，风险事件减少96.4%，有效任务完成率提高32.6%。

Conclusion: AAGMM为从业者提供了管理自主AI代理并最大化业务回报的可操作路线图，填补了学术文献中连接治理能力与可衡量业务成果的正式治理成熟度模型的空白。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of agentic AI in enterprise business operations--autonomous systems capable of planning, reasoning, and executing multi-step workflows--has created an urgent governance crisis. Organizations face uncontrolled agent sprawl: the proliferation of redundant, ungoverned, and conflicting AI agents across business functions. Industry surveys report that only 21% of enterprises have mature governance models for autonomous agents, while 40% of agentic AI projects are projected to fail by 2027 due to inadequate governance and risk controls. Despite growing acknowledgment of this challenge, academic literature lacks a formal, empirically validated governance maturity model connecting governance capability to measurable business outcomes. This paper introduces the Agentic AI Governance Maturity Model (AAGMM), a five-level framework spanning 12 governance domains, grounded in NIST AI RMF and ISO/IEC 42001 standards. We additionally propose a novel taxonomy of agent sprawl patterns--functional duplication, shadow agents, orphaned agents, permission creep, and unmonitored delegation chains--each linked to quantifiable business cost models. The framework is validated through 750 simulation runs across five enterprise scenarios and five governance maturity levels, measuring business outcomes including cost containment, risk incident rates, operational efficiency, and decision quality. Results demonstrate statistically significant differences (p < 0.001, large effect sizes d > 2.0) between all governance maturity levels, with Level 4-5 organizations achieving 94.3% lower sprawl indices, 96.4% fewer risk incidents, and 32.6% higher effective task completion rates compared to Level 1. The AAGMM provides practitioners with an actionable roadmap for governing autonomous AI agents while maximizing business returns.

</details>


### [470] [Semantic Consensus: Process-Aware Conflict Detection and Resolution for Enterprise Multi-Agent LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16339)
*Vivek Acharya*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出语义共识框架(SCF)，解决多智能体LLM系统中语义意图分歧问题，实现100%工作流完成率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前企业AI自动化中多智能体LLM系统失败率高达41%-86.7%，其中79%的失败源于规范和协调问题而非模型能力限制。语义意图分歧（智能体对共享目标产生不一致解释）是主要但未被正式解决的根本原因。

Method: 提出语义共识框架(SCF)，包含六个组件：过程上下文层（共享操作语义）、语义意图图（形式化意图表示）、冲突检测引擎（实时识别矛盾意图组合）、共识解决协议（策略-权威-时间层次结构）、漂移监控器（检测渐进语义分歧）、过程感知治理集成层（组织策略执行）。

Result: 在三个多智能体框架（AutoGen、CrewAI、LangGraph）和四个企业场景的600次运行评估中，SCF是唯一实现100%工作流完成率的方法（次优基线仅25.1%），能检测65.2%的语义冲突（精度27.9%），并提供完整的治理审计追踪。

Conclusion: SCF框架有效解决了多智能体LLM系统中的语义意图分歧问题，显著提高了工作流完成率，支持协议无关性并与MCP和A2A通信标准兼容，为企业AI自动化提供了可靠的协调解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems are rapidly emerging as the dominant architecture for enterprise AI automation, yet production deployments exhibit failure rates between 41% and 86.7%, with nearly 79% of failures originating from specification and coordination issues rather than model capability limitations. This paper identifies Semantic Intent Divergence--the phenomenon whereby cooperating LLM agents develop inconsistent interpretations of shared objectives due to siloed context and absent process models--as a primary yet formally unaddressed root cause of multi-agent failure in enterprise settings. We propose the Semantic Consensus Framework (SCF), a process-aware middleware comprising six components: a Process Context Layer for shared operational semantics, a Semantic Intent Graph for formal intent representation, a Conflict Detection Engine for real-time identification of contradictory, contention-based, and causally invalid intent combinations, a Consensus Resolution Protocol using a policy--authority--temporal hierarchy, a Drift Monitor for detecting gradual semantic divergence, and a Process-Aware Governance Integration layer for organizational policy enforcement. Evaluation across 600 runs spanning three multi-agent frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph) and four enterprise scenarios demonstrates that SCF is the only approach to achieve 100% workflow completion--compared to 25.1% for the next-best baseline--while detecting 65.2% of semantic conflicts with 27.9% precision and providing complete governance audit trails. The framework is protocol-agnostic and compatible with MCP and A2A communication standards.

</details>


### [471] [Computational Hermeneutics: Evaluating generative AI as a cultural technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16403)
*Cody Kommers,Ruth Ahnert,Maria Antoniak,Emmanouil Benetos,Steve Benford,Mercedes Bunz,Baptiste Caramiaux,Shauna Concannon,Martin Disley,James Dobson,Yali Du,Edgar Duéñez-Guzmán,Kerry Francksen,Evelyn Gius,Jonathan W. Y. Gray,Ryan Heuser,Sarah Immel,Richard Jean So,Sang Leigh,Dalaki Livingston,Hoyt Long,Meredith Martin,Georgia Meyer,Daniela Mihai,Ashley Noel-Hirst,Kirsten Ostherr,Deven Parker,Yipeng Qin,Jessica Ratcliff,Emily Robinson,Karina Rodriguez,Adam Sobey,Ted Underwood,Aditya Vashistha,Matthew Wilkens,Youyou Wu,Yuan Zheng,Drew Hemment*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出生成式AI应被视为"语境机器"，需从诠释学角度评估，强调语境、多元性和模糊性，而非仅测量准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI评估框架将文化视为可测量变量，而非系统运作的根本。生成式AI作为文化技术，需要基于诠释学理论建立更本质的评估范式。

Method: 借鉴人文学科的诠释学理论，提出生成式AI是"语境机器"，面临三个诠释挑战：情境性、多元性和模糊性。提出计算诠释学框架和三个评估原则。

Result: 建立了计算诠释学作为新兴框架，为生成式AI系统提供诠释性解释，并提出迭代评估、人机结合、测量文化语境而非仅模型输出的评估原则。

Conclusion: 该视角为当代AI系统设计和评估提供了新范式：从关注准确性的标准化问题转向关注意义的语境化问题。

Abstract: Generative AI systems are increasingly recognized as cultural technologies, yet current evaluation frameworks often treat culture as a variable to be measured rather than fundamental to the system's operation. Drawing on hermeneutic theory from the humanities, we argue that GenAI systems function as "context machines" that must inherently address three interpretive challenges: situatedness (meaning only emerges in context), plurality (multiple valid interpretations coexist), and ambiguity (interpretations naturally conflict). We present computational hermeneutics as an emerging framework offering an interpretive account of what GenAI systems do, and how they might do it better. We offer three principles for hermeneutic evaluation -- that benchmarks should be iterative, not one-off; include people, not just machines; and measure cultural context, not just model output. This perspective offers a nascent paradigm for designing and evaluating contemporary AI systems: shifting from standardized questions about accuracy to contextual ones about meaning.

</details>


### [472] [Heterogeneous Self-Play for Realistic Highway Traffic Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16406)
*Jinkai Qiu,Alessandro Saviolo,Chaojie Wang,Mingke Wang,Xiaoyu Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PHASE是一个用于高速公路场景生成的自博弈框架，通过条件控制、合成场景生成和多智能体训练，实现了可控、真实的高速公路交通模拟，并在真实场景中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高速公路模拟对自动驾驶安全评估至关重要，但现有方法难以同时满足：覆盖广泛的速度和机动行为、可控生成罕见安全关键场景、多智能体交互的行为可信度。

Method: PHASE采用上下文感知的自博弈框架，包括：基于智能体的显式条件控制、合成场景生成、闭环多智能体训练、支持不同车辆类型、早期终止、碰撞责任归属、高速公路奖励塑造、耦合课程学习和鲁棒策略优化。

Result: 在exiD数据集的512个未见真实场景中实现零样本迁移，成功率96.3%，ADE/FDE从6.57/12.07m降至2.44/5.25m；在轨迹嵌入空间中，相比IDM模型，Fréchet轨迹距离减少13.1%，能量距离减少20.2%。

Conclusion: 合成自博弈为可控且真实的高速公路场景生成提供了可扩展的途径，无需直接模仿专家日志数据，在真实场景中表现出良好的迁移能力和行为真实性。

Abstract: Realistic highway simulation is critical for scalable safety evaluation of autonomous vehicles, particularly for interactions that are too rare to study from logged data alone. Yet highway traffic generation remains challenging because it requires broad coverage across speeds and maneuvers, controllable generation of rare safety-critical scenarios, and behavioral credibility in multi-agent interactions. We present PHASE, Policy for Heterogeneous Agent Self-play on Expressway, a context-aware self-play framework that addresses these three requirements through explicit per-agent conditioning for controllability, synthetic scenario generation for broad highway coverage, and closed-loop multi-agent training for realistic interaction dynamics. PHASE further supports different vehicle profiles, for example, passenger cars and articulated trailer trucks, within a single policy via vehicle-aware dynamics and context-conditioned actions, and stabilizes self-play with early termination of unrecoverable states, at-fault collision attribution, highway-aware reward shaping, coupled curricula, and robust policy optimization. Despite being trained only on synthetic data, PHASE transfers zero-shot to 512 unseen high-interaction real scenarios in exiD, achieving a 96.3% success rate and reducing ADE/FDE from 6.57/12.07 m to 2.44/5.25 m relative to a prior self-play baseline. In a learned trajectory embedding space, it also improves behavioral realism over IDM, reducing Frechet trajectory distance by 13.1% and energy distance by 20.2%. These results show that synthetic self-play can provide a scalable route to controllable and realistic highway scenario generation without direct imitation of expert logs.

</details>


### [473] [Support Sufficiency as Consequence-Sensitive Compression in Belief Arbitration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16434)
*Mark Walsh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种支持感知的仲裁架构，认为系统压缩证据结构时不能仅保留内容和置信度，而应根据后果敏感性动态调节支持结构的保留程度，以实现最佳控制性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法假设选择的内容和标量置信度足以支持下游控制，但本文认为这不够。系统在承诺假设时会丢失大量证据结构，确定压缩后应保留什么本身就是一个后果敏感的问题。

Method: 开发了一种循环仲裁架构，其中活动约束场共同确定候选假设的几何结构。系统将该几何结构压缩为支持感知的控制状态，其分辨率由当前后果几何、仲裁记忆和资源约束调节。

Result: 有界目标形式化了权衡：保留太少支持会破坏策略相关区别，导致控制器在验证、弃权和恢复方面误操作；保留太多支持会在过于精细的上下文中分散学习，降低适应性。自适应控制器在累积效用上优于所有固定分辨率控制器，敏捷自适应控制优于迟钝自适应控制。

Conclusion: 支持充分性不应被视为静态表示阈值，而应作为动态压缩标准。稳健的仲裁取决于在当前后果环境下保留足够策略的最小支持结构，并在推理和行动的重复周期中随着条件变化调节该结构。

Abstract: When a system commits to a hypothesis, much of the evidential structure behind that commitment is lost to compression. Standard accounts assume that selected content and scalar confidence suffice for downstream control. This paper argues that they do not, and that determining what must survive compression is itself a consequence-sensitive problem. We develop a recurrent arbitration architecture in which active constraint fields jointly determine a hypothesis geometry over candidates. Rather than carrying that geometry forward in full, the system compresses it into a support-aware control state whose resolution is regulated by current consequence geometry, arbitration memory, and resource constraints.
  A bounded objective formalizes the tradeoff. Too little retained support collapses policy-relevant distinctions, producing controllers that select content adequately while misrouting verification, abstention, and recovery. Too much retained support fragments learning across overly fine contexts, degrading adaptation even as discrimination improves. These failure modes yield ordered controller predictions confirmed by a minimal repeated-interaction simulation. Adaptive controllers that regulate support resolution outperform all fixed-resolution controllers in cumulative utility. Agile adaptive control outperforms sluggish adaptive control. Fixed high-resolution control achieves the best commitment accuracy but still trails adaptive controllers because resource cost and learning fragmentation offset the gains from richer retention.
  Support sufficiency should be understood not as a static representational threshold, but as a dynamic compression criterion. Robust arbitration depends on preserving the smallest support structure adequate for policy under the current consequence landscape, and on regulating that structure as conditions change across repeated cycles of inference and action.

</details>


### [474] [Healthcare AI for Automation or Allocation? A Transaction Cost Economics Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16465)
*Ari Ercole*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究使用O*NET职业数据库，通过大语言模型将医疗任务编码为交易成本类别，发现临床角色的交易成本强度显著高于非临床角色，主要由信息搜索和决策相关协调负担驱动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗生产力不仅受临床复杂性影响，还受不确定性下协调工作的成本影响。交易成本经济学提供了协调摩擦的理论，但很少在医疗职业的任务层面进行操作化研究。

Method: 使用O*NET职业数据库的任务陈述和频率权重，在任务粒度上描述医疗工作，通过约束大语言模型将每个独特任务编码为主要的交易成本类别（信息搜索、决策与谈判、监控与执行、适应与协调）和总体交易成本强度分数，然后聚合到职业层面。

Result: 临床角色的交易成本强度显著高于非临床角色，主要由更大的信息搜索和决策相关协调负担驱动，而职业内部的交易成本分散度没有差异。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了医疗角色间协调工作性质的系统性异质性，表明数字和AI干预的机会分布不均，更多地受底层协调结构而非技术任务复杂性的影响。

Abstract: Healthcare productivity is shaped not only by clinical complexity but by the costs of coordinating work under uncertainty. Transaction-cost economics offers a theory of these coordination frictions, yet has rarely been operationalised at task level across health occupations. Using task statements and frequency weights from the O*NET occupational database, we characterised healthcare work at task granularity and coded each unique task using a constrained large language model into one dominant transaction-cost category (information search, decision and bargaining, monitoring and enforcement, or adaptation and coordination) together with an overall transaction-cost intensity score. Aggregating to the occupation level, clinician roles exhibited substantially higher transaction-cost intensity than non-clinician roles, driven primarily by greater burdens of information search and decision-related coordination, while dispersion of transaction costs within occupations did not differ. These findings demonstrate systematic heterogeneity in the nature of coordination work across healthcare roles and suggest that the opportunities for digital and AI interventions are unevenly distributed, shaped less by technical task complexity than by underlying coordination structure.

</details>


### [475] [Agentic Frameworks for Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16646)
*Zeeshan Rasheed,Abdul Malik Sami,Muhammad Waseem,Kai-Kristian Kemell,Mika Saari,Pekka Abrahamsson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 首次大规模实证评估22个AI代理框架在推理任务上的表现，发现19个能完成所有基准测试，12个表现稳定，但数学推理能力显著下降，框架选择应优先考虑编排质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI代理框架在复杂推理和决策方面取得进展，但缺乏对其性能、效率和实用性的实证比较证据，需要填补这一研究空白。

Method: 从2023年1月至2025年7月收集的1200个GitHub仓库中选取22个广泛使用的代理框架，基于架构设计进行分类，在统一设置下评估其在BBH、GSM8K和ARC三个推理基准上的表现，测量推理准确率、执行时间、计算成本和跨基准一致性。

Result: 22个框架中19个完成所有基准测试，12个表现稳定（平均准确率74.6-75.9%，执行时间4-6秒/任务，成本0.14-0.18美分/任务）。数学推理能力显著下降（GSM8K平均准确率44.35%，BBH 89.80%，ARC 89.56%）。性能差的主要原因是编排问题而非推理限制。

Conclusion: 这是首次对推理密集型软件工程任务的代理框架进行大规模实证比较，表明框架选择应优先考虑编排质量，特别是内存控制、故障处理和成本管理。

Abstract: Recent advances in agentic frameworks have enabled AI agents to perform complex reasoning and decision-making. However, evidence comparing their reasoning performance, efficiency, and practical suitability remains limited. To address this gap, we empirically evaluate 22 widely used agentic frameworks across three reasoning benchmarks: BBH, GSM8K, and ARC. The frameworks were selected from 1,200 GitHub repositories collected between January 2023 and July 2025 and organized into a taxonomy based on architectural design. We evaluated them under a unified setting, measuring reasoning accuracy, execution time, computational cost, and cross-benchmark consistency.
  Our results show that 19 of the 22 frameworks completed all three benchmarks. Among these, 12 showed stable performance, with mean accuracy of 74.6-75.9%, execution time of 4-6 seconds per task, and cost of 0.14-0.18 cents per task. Poorer results were mainly caused by orchestration problems rather than reasoning limits. For example, Camel failed to complete BBH after 11 days because of uncontrolled context growth, while Upsonic consumed USD 1,434 in one day because repeated extraction failures triggered costly retries. AutoGen and Mastra also exhausted API quotas through iterative interactions that increased prompt length without improving results.
  We also found a sharp drop in mathematical reasoning. Mean accuracy on GSM8K was 44.35%, compared with 89.80% on BBH and 89.56% on ARC. Overall, this study provides the first large-scale empirical comparison of agentic frameworks for reasoning-intensive software engineering tasks and shows that framework selection should prioritize orchestration quality, especially memory control, failure handling, and cost management.

</details>


### [476] [From Subsumption to Satisfiability: LLM-Assisted Active Learning for OWL Ontologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16672)
*Haoruo Zhao,Wenshuo Tang,Duncan Guthrie,Michele Sevegnani,David Flynn,Paul Harvey*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种使用大语言模型（LLMs）辅助本体构建的新方法，通过将候选公理转化为反概念并用受控自然语言表述，让LLMs提供近似反概念实例的现实例子，从而确保建模过程中只可能出现II类错误，避免引入不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在主动学习中，成员查询（MQs）允许学习者向教师提问（如"每个苹果都是水果吗？"），教师会正确回答是或否。这些MQs可以视为针对目标本体的包含测试。受描述逻辑中将包含问题归约为可满足性问题的标准方法启发，研究者希望利用LLMs来辅助本体构建过程。

Method: 将每个候选公理转化为对应的反概念，并用受控自然语言表述后呈现给大语言模型（LLMs）。LLMs作为第三个组件，提供近似反概念实例的现实世界例子。这种设计确保了在本体建模中只可能出现II类错误（假阴性），而不会引入不一致性。

Result: 在13个商业LLMs上的实验结果表明，对应于框架中II类错误的召回率在多个成熟的本体中保持稳定。这意味着该方法在不同本体上具有一致的性能表现。

Conclusion: 通过将LLMs整合到本体构建过程中，并利用反概念表述和受控自然语言，可以创建一个安全的建模环境，其中只可能出现II类错误（延迟构建过程但不会引入不一致性），而不会出现I类错误（引入不一致性）。

Abstract: In active learning, membership queries (MQs) allow a learner to pose questions to a teacher, such as ''Is every apple a fruit?'', to which the teacher responds correctly with yes or no. These MQs can be viewed as subsumption tests with respect to the target ontology. Inspired by the standard reduction of subsumption to satisfiability in description logics, we reformulate each candidate axiom into its corresponding counter-concept and verbalise it in controlled natural language before presenting it to Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce LLMs as a third component that provides real-world examples approximating an instance of the counter-concept. This design property ensures that only Type II errors may occur in ontology modelling; in the worst case, these errors merely delay the construction process without introducing inconsistencies. Experimental results on 13 commercial LLMs show that recall, corresponding to Type II errors in our framework, remains stable across several well-established ontologies.

</details>


### [477] [Agentic Risk-Aware Set-Based Engineering Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16687)
*Varun Kumar,George Em Karniadakis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个基于LLM的多智能体框架，用于早期工程设计的参数空间探索和风险量化管理，以空气动力学翼型设计为例，通过专业智能体协作和CVaR风险度量来筛选设计候选方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期工程设计阶段面临参数空间巨大、不确定性高的挑战，传统方法难以高效处理。需要利用AI技术自动化高容量分析任务，同时保持人类专家的决策主导地位。

Method: 采用基于集合的设计哲学，构建由编码助手、设计智能体、系统工程智能体、分析师智能体组成的多智能体系统，由人类管理者协调。集成CVaR作为风险度量指标，通过全局敏感性分析生成启发式规则，系统化探索和筛选初始设计候选方案。

Result: 框架能够自动化处理大量分析任务，通过风险量化筛选出有前景的设计候选方案，并辅以高保真CFD模拟，最终为人类管理者提供经过风险评估的精选设计方案集合。

Conclusion: 该多智能体框架有效结合了AI的计算能力和人类专家的决策能力，通过集成正式风险管理机制，显著提升了早期工程设计阶段的探索效率和决策质量。

Abstract: This paper introduces a multi-agent framework guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in the early stages of engineering design, a phase often characterized by vast parameter spaces and inherent uncertainty. Operating under a human-in-the-loop paradigm and demonstrated on the canonical problem of aerodynamic airfoil design, the framework employs a team of specialized agents: a Coding Assistant, a Design Agent, a Systems Engineering Agent, and an Analyst Agent - all coordinated by a human Manager. Integrated within a set-based design philosophy, the process begins with a collaborative phase where the Manager and Coding Assistant develop a suite of validated tools, after which the agents execute a structured workflow to systematically explore and prune a large set of initial design candidates. A key contribution of this work is the explicit integration of formal risk management, employing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a quantitative metric to filter designs that exhibit a high probability of failing to meet performance requirements, specifically the target coefficient of lift. The framework automates labor-intensive initial exploration through a global sensitivity analysis conducted by the Analyst agent, which generates actionable heuristics to guide the other agents. The process culminates by presenting the human Manager with a curated final set of promising design candidates, augmented with high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations. This approach effectively leverages AI to handle high-volume analytical tasks, thereby enhancing the decision-making capability of the human expert in selecting the final, risk-assessed design.

</details>


### [478] [Training and Agentic Inference Strategies for LLM-based Manim Animation Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18364)
*Ravidu Suien Rammuni Silva,Ahmad Lotfi,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,Golnaz Shahtahmassebi,Jordan J. Bird*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了ManimTrainer训练管道和ManimAgent推理管道，用于提升LLM生成Manim程序动画的能力，通过SFT和GRPO训练结合RITL推理策略，在Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型上取得了最佳效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成程序动画（如Manim）对LLM提出了独特挑战：需要空间推理、时间序列理解和领域特定API知识，这些在通用预训练数据中代表性不足。目前缺乏对此场景下训练和推理策略交互的系统研究。

Method: 1. ManimTrainer训练管道：结合监督微调（SFT）和基于强化学习的组相对策略优化（GRPO），使用融合代码和视觉评估信号的统一奖励信号。
2. ManimAgent推理管道：采用渲染器在环（RITL）和API文档增强的RITL（RITL-DOC）策略。
3. 在ManimBench上评估17个开源30B以下LLM，测试9种训练和推理策略组合。

Result: 1. SFT主要提升代码质量，GRPO改善视觉输出并增强模型在推理时对外部信号的响应能力。
2. Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型结合GRPO和RITL-DOC取得最佳性能：94%渲染成功率（RSR）和85.7%视觉相似度（VS），比GPT-4.1基线提升3个百分点。
3. 代码和视觉指标的相关性随SFT和GRPO增强，但随推理时增强而减弱，表明训练和推理策略的互补作用。

Conclusion: 该研究首次为Manim文本-代码-视频转换提供了统一的训练和推理研究框架，证明了训练策略（SFT、GRPO）和推理策略（RITL、RITL-DOC）在程序动画生成中的互补价值，为领域特定代码生成任务提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Generating programmatic animation using libraries such as Manim presents unique challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs), requiring spatial reasoning, temporal sequencing, and familiarity with domain-specific APIs that are underrepresented in general pre-training data. A systematic study of how training and inference strategies interact in this setting is lacking in current research. This study introduces ManimTrainer, a training pipeline that combines Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) using a unified reward signal that fuses code and visual assessment signals, and ManimAgent, an inference pipeline featuring Renderer-in-the-loop (RITL) and API documentation-augmented RITL (RITL-DOC) strategies. Using these techniques, this study presents the first unified training and inference study for text-to-code-to-video transformation with Manim. It evaluates 17 open-source sub-30B LLMs across nine combinations of training and inference strategies using ManimBench. Results show that SFT generally improves code quality, while GRPO enhances visual outputs and increases the models' responsiveness to extrinsic signals during self-correction at inference time. The Qwen 3 Coder 30B model with GRPO and RITL-DOC achieved the highest overall performance, with a 94% Render Success Rate (RSR) and 85.7% Visual Similarity (VS) to reference videos, surpassing the baseline GPT-4.1 model by +3 percentage points in VS. Additionally, the analysis shows that the correlation between code and visual metrics strengthens with SFT and GRPO but weakens with inference-time enhancements, highlighting the complementary roles of training and agentic inference strategies in Manim animation generation.

</details>


### [479] [The Query Channel: Information-Theoretic Limits of Masking-Based Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16689)
*Erciyes Karakaya,Ozgur Ercetin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文将基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）建模为通信信道问题，推导出解释恢复的容量界限，并提出信息论框架来评估解释方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）缺乏理论保证，无法确定需要多少查询才能可靠地恢复特征重要性解释。需要建立信息论框架来分析解释过程的根本限制。

Method: 将解释过程建模为通信信道：潜在解释作为消息，每个掩码评估作为信道使用。推导解释恢复的强逆定理和可达性结果，使用互信息的蒙特卡洛估计器作为查询基准，比较最优解码与Lasso/OLS方法。

Result: 建立了解释恢复的信息论容量界限，证明当解释率超过容量时，精确恢复概率必然趋近于零；而稀疏最大似然解码器在低于容量时可实现可靠恢复。实验显示存在查询预算范围，信息论允许可靠解释但标准凸替代方法仍失败。

Conclusion: 该信息论框架为解释方法提供了理论基础，揭示了超像素分辨率、高斯噪声和非线性曲率如何降低查询信道性能，导致瀑布和误差平台行为，使高分辨率解释不可实现。这为设计更有效的解释方法提供了指导。

Abstract: Masking-based post-hoc explanation methods, such as KernelSHAP and LIME, estimate local feature importance by querying a black-box model under randomized perturbations. This paper formulates this procedure as communication over a query channel, where the latent explanation acts as a message and each masked evaluation is a channel use. Within this framework, the complexity of the explanation is captured by the entropy of the hypothesis class, while the query interface supplies information at a rate determined by an identification capacity per query. We derive a strong converse showing that, if the explanation rate exceeds this capacity, the probability of exact recovery necessarily converges to one in error for any sequence of explainers and decoders. We also prove an achievability result establishing that a sparse maximum-likelihood decoder attains reliable recovery when the rate lies below capacity. A Monte Carlo estimator of mutual information yields a non-asymptotic query benchmark that we use to compare optimal decoding with Lasso- and OLS-based procedures that mirror LIME and KernelSHAP. Experiments reveal a range of query budgets where information theory permits reliable explanations but standard convex surrogates still fail. Finally, we interpret super-pixel resolution and tokenization for neural language models as a source-coding choice that sets the entropy of the explanation and show how Gaussian noise and nonlinear curvature degrade the query channel, induce waterfall and error-floor behavior, and render high-resolution explanations unattainable.

</details>


### [480] [RankGuide: Tensor-Rank-Guided Routing and Steering for Efficient Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16694)
*Jiayi Tian,Yupeng Su,Ryan Solgi,Souvik Kundu,Zheng Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RankGuide框架通过张量秩引导的路由和调控，提升小推理模型与大推理模型协作系统的效率和准确性，减少推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型虽然能生成多步思维链推理，但推理延迟和计算开销大。现有小推理模型协作系统在检测和缓解小模型失败方面仍面临挑战。

Method: 分析小推理模型在生成文本和隐藏状态空间的失败模式，提出RankGuide框架：1) 利用连续隐藏状态的张量秩信号进行路由，检测小模型可能失败时选择性调用大模型；2) 引入张量秩过滤的调控向量提取方法，改善小模型的生成质量。

Result: 在多个推理基准测试中，RankGuide相比大型推理模型减少延迟达1.75倍，同时保持与先前方法相当的准确性。

Conclusion: RankGuide通过张量秩信号改进路由和调控，使小推理模型-大推理模型协作系统能够以更少步骤实现更高效的推理，并提高准确性。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) enhance problem-solving capabilities by generating explicit multi-step chains of thought (CoT) reasoning; however, they incur substantial inference latency and computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, recent works have explored model collaboration paradigms, where small reasoning models (SRMs) generate intermediate reasoning steps to achieve a better accuracy--latency trade-off. Despite recent progress, effectively and efficiently detecting and mitigating SRM failures in collaborative systems remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we analyze SRM inference in both the generated text and hidden-state spaces, and identify three types of failure modes: \textit{overconfidence}, \textit{uncertainty}, and \textit{heavy revalidation}. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{RankGuide}, a framework that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of SRM--LRM collaboration through tensor-rank-guided routing and steering. Specifically, RankGuide leverages a routing signal that incorporates tensor-rank signals derived from consecutive hidden states to detect when SRMs are likely to fail and selectively invoke LRMs. In addition, we introduce a tensor-rank-filtered steering vector extraction method to modulate the reasoning trajectory of SRMs, thereby improving their generation quality. By improving both routing and steering through tensor-rank signals, RankGuide enables SRM--LRM collaborative systems to achieve more efficient reasoning with fewer steps and improved accuracy. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of RankGuide in reducing latency by up to $1.75\times$ compared to LRM, while maintaining competitive accuracy relative to prior methods.

</details>


### [481] [Evaluating Tool-Using Language Agents: Judge Reliability, Propagation Cascades, and Runtime Mitigation in AgentProp-Bench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16706)
*Bhaskar Gurram*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AgentProp-Bench是一个包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹的基准测试，用于评估工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估可靠性。研究发现基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为偶然水平，而三模型集成能达到中等一致性。参数级错误会以约62%的概率传播到最终答案，拒绝和恢复是独立的能力。运行时拦截器能减少幻觉，但效果因模型而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估被广泛认为是可靠的，但这种假设很少通过人工标注进行验证。研究旨在量化评估者的可靠性、描述错误传播特征，并评估运行时缓解措施。

Method: 引入AgentProp-Bench基准测试，包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹，涵盖四个领域和九个生产级LLM。使用100个标签的人工验证子集，量化评估者可靠性，分析错误传播，并测试运行时拦截器的效果。

Result: 基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为kappa=0.049（偶然水平）；三模型集成达到kappa=0.432（中等一致性），具有保守偏差。参数级注入以约62%的概率传播到错误最终答案。拒绝和恢复是独立的能力。调优的运行时拦截器在GPT-4o-mini上减少23.0个百分点的幻觉，但对Gemini-2.0-Flash无显著效果。

Conclusion: 工具使用型LLM代理的自动评估可靠性远低于假设，需要更严格的验证。错误传播概率高，拒绝和恢复是独立能力。运行时缓解措施的有效性因模型而异，需要针对性的解决方案。

Abstract: Automated evaluation of tool-using large language model (LLM) agents is widely assumed to be reliable, but this assumption has rarely been validated against human annotation. We introduce AgentProp-Bench, a 2,000-task benchmark with 2,300 traces across four domains, nine production LLMs, and a 100-label human-validated subset. We quantify judge reliability, characterize error propagation, and evaluate a runtime mitigation. Substring-based judging agrees with human annotation at kappa=0.049 (chance-level); a three-LLM ensemble reaches kappa=0.432 (moderate) with a conservative bias. Under validated evaluation, a parameter-level injection propagates to a wrong final answer with human-calibrated probability approximately 0.62 (range 0.46-0.73 across models). Rejection (catching bad parameters) and recovery (correcting after acceptance) are independent model capabilities (Spearman rho=0.126, p=0.747). A tuned runtime interceptor reduces hallucination on GPT-4o-mini by 23.0 percentage points under a concurrent n=600 control, but shows no significant effect on Gemini-2.0-Flash, whose aggressive parameter rejection eliminates the target failure mode. All code, data, traces, and human labels are released at https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench.

</details>


### [482] [Debate as Reward: A Multi-Agent Reward System for Scientific Ideation via RL Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16723)
*Moein Salimi,Babak Hosseini Mohtasham,Amin Aghakasiri,Mahdi Naieni,Amir Hossein Qeysarbeigi,Mohammad Masih Shalchian Nazer,Zahra Azar,Mahdi Jafari Siavoshani,Mohammad Hossein Rohban*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个针对高质量科学想法生成的强化学习框架，通过多智能体奖励函数和去偏优化方法解决奖励攻击问题，在ICLR数据集上显著优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在科学想法生成中存在幻觉和计算效率低的问题，强化学习在开放领域面临奖励攻击的瓶颈——模型利用不完善的评估代理来最大化分数而非产生真正的科学创新。

Method: 提出专门用于高质量科学想法生成的RL框架，设计首个多智能体奖励函数作为评判者，将方法验证与实现细节解耦，提供严格的二元奖励；使用无偏的Group Relative Policy Optimization变体来减轻人工长度偏差；基于ICLR-320数据集（从ICLR 2024会议提取的问题-解决方案对）进行训练。

Result: 实验表明，该框架在专家评估的新颖性、可行性和有效性指标上显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 提出的RL框架通过专门的奖励设计和优化方法，有效解决了科学想法生成中的奖励攻击问题，能够产生高质量的科学创新想法。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in automating scientific ideation, yet current approaches relying on iterative prompting or complex multi-agent architectures often suffer from hallucination or computational inefficiency. A critical bottleneck in applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to this open-ended domain is reward hacking -- where models exploit imperfect evaluation proxies to maximize scores without producing genuine scientific innovation. To address these limitations, we propose an RL framework explicitly tailored for high-quality scientific idea generation. We propose the first multi-agent reward function designed to serve as a judge, decoupling methodological validation from implementation details while providing strict binary rewards that are robust to reward hacking. To effectively optimize against this sparse signal, we utilize an unbiased variant of Group Relative Policy Optimization to mitigate artificial length bias. We grounded our training in ICLR-320, a curated dataset of problem-solution pairs extracted from ICLR 2024 proceedings. Experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across expert-evaluated metrics of novelty, feasibility, and effectiveness.

</details>


### [483] [When Agents Go Quiet: Output Generation Capacity and Format-Cost Separation for LLM Document Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16736)
*Justice Owusu Agyemang,Michael Agyare,Miriam Kobbinah,Nathaniel Agbugblah,Prosper Addo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出输出停滞问题理论框架，通过输出生成容量、格式成本分离定理和自适应策略选择来防止LLM编码代理生成大文档时的静默失败，并实现GEN-PILOT工具减少48-72%的生成token。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM驱动的编码代理在生成大型、格式密集的文档时会出现"输出停滞"问题——代理静默产生空响应。这种失败模式尚未被充分理解，需要理论框架来解释和预防。

Method: 提出三个核心贡献：1) 输出生成容量(OGC)作为代理在给定上下文状态下有效产生输出的形式化度量；2) 格式成本分离定理，证明延迟模板渲染总是比直接生成更token高效；3) 自适应策略选择框架，根据估计输出成本与可用OGC的比率选择最优生成策略（直接、分块或延迟）。

Result: 在三个模型(Claude 3.5 Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama 3.1 70B)和四种文档类型上的实验验证：延迟渲染在所有条件下减少LLM生成token 48-72%，完全消除输出停滞。消融研究分离了每个组件的贡献。

Conclusion: 该理论框架成功解释了输出停滞问题并提供了预防方法，通过GEN-PILOT开源MCP服务器实现了理论到实践的转化，显著提高了LLM编码代理生成大型格式文档的效率和可靠性。

Abstract: LLM-powered coding agents suffer from a poorly understood failure mode we term output stalling: the agent silently produces empty responses when attempting to generate large, format-heavy documents. We present a theoretical framework that explains and prevents this failure through three contributions. (1) We introduce Output Generation Capacity (OGC), a formal measure of an agent's effective ability to produce output given its current context state - distinct from and empirically smaller than the raw context window. (2) We prove a Format-Cost Separation Theorem showing that deferred template rendering is always at least as token-efficient as direct generation for any format with overhead multiplier $μ_f > 1$, and derive tight bounds on the savings. (3) We formalize Adaptive Strategy Selection, a decision framework that maps the ratio of estimated output cost to available OGC into an optimal generation strategy (direct, chunked, or deferred). We validate the theory through controlled experiments across three models (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Llama 3.1 70B), four document types, and an ablation study isolating each component's contribution. Deferred rendering reduces LLM generation tokens by 48-72% across all conditions and eliminates output stalling entirely. We instantiate the framework as GEN-PILOT, an open-source MCP server, demonstrating that the theory translates directly into a practical tool.

</details>


### [484] [CT Open: An Open-Access, Uncontaminated, Live Platform for the Open Challenge of Clinical Trial Outcome Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16742)
*Jianyou Wang,Youze Zheng,Longtian Bao,Hanyuan Zhang,Qirui Zheng,Yuhan Chen,Yang Zhang,Matthew Feng,Maxim Khan,Aditya K. Sehgal,Christopher D. Rosin,Ramamohan Paturi,Umber Dube,Leon Bergen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CT Open是一个开放的临床试验结果预测平台，通过自动化去污染流程确保预测在结果公布前进行，每年举办四次挑战赛，任何人都可以参与。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学家长期寻求在真实世界事件发生前准确预测结果，临床试验结果预测对领域专家来说也是高风险的开放挑战。研究AI系统是否能更可靠地进行此类预测。

Method: 开发CT Open开放平台，采用基于LLM的迭代网络搜索自动化去污染管道，识别试验结果的最早提及时间，确保评估的试验在预测时结果尚未公开。

Result: 发布训练集和两个时间戳测试基准（Winter 2025和Summer 2025），验证了去污染管道的质量和准确性，平台允许参与者使用任何方法和数据源。

Conclusion: CT Open可作为推进AI在真实世界事件发生前进行预测研究的中心枢纽，同时为生物医学研究和临床试验设计提供信息，平台已上线运行。

Abstract: Scientists have long sought to accurately predict outcomes of real-world events before they happen. Can AI systems do so more reliably? We study this question through clinical trial outcome prediction, a high-stakes open challenge even for domain experts. We introduce CT Open, an open-access, live platform that will run four challenge every year. Anyone can submit predictions for each challenge. CT Open evaluates those submissions on trials whose outcomes were not yet public at the time of submission but were made public afterwards. Determining if a trial's outcome is public on the internet before a certain date is surprisingly difficult. Outcomes posted on official registries may lag behind by years, while the first mention may appear in obscure articles. To address this, we propose a novel, fully automated decontamination pipeline that uses iterative LLM-powered web search to identify the earliest mention of trial outcomes. We validate the pipeline's quality and accuracy by human expert's annotations. Since CT Open's pipeline ensures that every evaluated trial had no publicly reported outcome when the prediction was made, it allows participants to use any methodology and any data source. In this paper, we release a training set and two time-stamped test benchmarks, Winter 2025 and Summer 2025. We believe CT Open can serve as a central hub for advancing AI research on forecasting real-world outcomes before they occur, while also informing biomedical research and improving clinical trial design. CT Open Platform is hosted at $\href{https://ct-open.net/}{https://ct-open.net/}$

</details>


### [485] [Why Training-Free Token Reduction Collapses: The Inherent Instability of Pairwise Scoring Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16745)
*Yang Shanglin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文分析了ViT无训练token缩减方法在高压下崩溃的原因，提出了诊断框架和解决方案CATIS，显著提升了压缩下的性能保持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的无训练token缩减方法（ToMe、ToFu、PiToMe、MCTF）在高压缩率下都会出现类似的悬崖式性能崩溃，但缺乏对其根本原因的系统性分析。本文旨在解释这一现象并提供改进方案。

Method: 提出了一个诊断框架，包含两个分析工具：排序一致性ρ_s和离对角线相关性ρ_off。该框架将崩溃分解为：(1)层间缩减固有的信号无关误差放大器；(2)基于成对相似性信号的排序一致性在深层网络中的退化。基于三个设计原则，构建了CATIS方法：使用一元信号提高触发阈值，采用分流机制抑制增益。

Result: 在ViT-Large上实现63% FLOPs缩减时，CATIS在ImageNet-1K上保持了96.9%的原始准确率（81.0%），而所有基线方法都崩溃到43-65%的准确率。

Conclusion: 本文揭示了无训练token缩减方法在高压缩下崩溃的根本原因，提出了有效的诊断工具和设计原则，并通过CATIS验证了这些原则的有效性，显著提升了压缩下的性能保持能力。

Abstract: Training-free token reduction methods for Vision Transformers (ToMe, ToFu, PiToMe, and MCTF) employ different scoring mechanisms, yet they share a closely matched cliff-like collapse at high compression. This paper explains \emph{why}. We develop a diagnostic framework with two tools, ranking consistency $ρ_s$ and off-diagonal correlation $ρ_\text{off}$, that decomposes the collapse into (1)a signal-agnostic error amplifier inherent to layer-wise reduction, predicting convex Pareto curves and $r_{\text{crit}} \propto 1/L$; and (2)shared reliance on \emph{pairwise} similarity signals whose ranking consistency degrades from $ρ_s{=}0.88$ to $0.27$ in deep layers. Pairwise rankings are inherently unstable ($O(N_p^2)$ joint perturbations) while unary signals enjoy greater stability ($O(N_p)$ perturbations, CLT). From three design principles derived from this diagnosis, we construct CATIS as a constructive validation: unary signals raise the trigger threshold, triage suppresses the gain. On ViT-Large at 63% FLOPs reduction, CATIS retains 96.9% of vanilla accuracy (81.0%) on ImageNet-1K where all baselines collapse to 43--65%.

</details>


### [486] [Don't Start What You Can't Finish: A Counterfactual Audit of Support-State Triage in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16752)
*Eren Unlu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出SSTA-32评估框架，测试AI代理在任务受阻时的诊断能力，发现前沿模型具备潜在分类能力但需要显式决策路径才能安全激活。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前代理评估主要关注完全指定任务的执行，而忽略了代理在任务受阻时的诊断能力。现有研究将澄清、能力意识、弃权和搜索终止等问题孤立研究，缺乏对代理诊断任务受阻原因能力的系统评估。

Method: 引入支持状态分类审计框架(SSTA-32)，通过最小反事实编辑将相同基础请求翻转为四种支持状态：完整、可澄清、支持受阻、当前不支持。使用四种提示条件评估前沿模型，并采用双角色自动审计(DPAA)和确定性启发式评分。

Result: 默认执行在非完整任务上过度承诺严重(41.7%)；标量置信度映射避免过度承诺但混淆了三方延迟空间(58.3%分类延迟准确率)；动作专用和预检支持检查提示通过呈现分类本体达到91.7%分类延迟准确率。针对性消融实验证实了不同维度的重要性。

Conclusion: 前沿模型具备强大的潜在分类能力，但需要显式分类决策路径才能安全激活。虽然DPAA在单一上下文窗口中运行，结果代表能力上限估计，但结构发现表明模型需要明确的分类决策路径来安全激活其分类能力。

Abstract: Current agent evaluations largely reward execution on fully specified tasks, while recent work studies clarification [11, 22, 2], capability awareness [9, 1], abstention [8, 14], and search termination [20, 5] mostly in isolation. This leaves open whether agents can diagnose why a task is blocked before acting. We introduce the Support-State Triage Audit (SSTA-32), a matched-item diagnostic framework in which minimal counterfactual edits flip the same base request across four support states: Complete (ANSWER), Clarifiable (CLARIFY), Support-Blocked (REQUEST SUPPORT), and Unsupported-Now (ABSTAIN). We evaluate a frontier model under four prompting conditions - Direct, Action-Only, Confidence-Only, and a typed Preflight Support Check (PSC) - using Dual-Persona Auto-Auditing (DPAA) with deterministic heuristic scoring. Default execution overcommits heavily on non-complete tasks (41.7% overcommitment rate). Scalar confidence mapping avoids overcommitment but collapses the three-way deferral space (58.3% typed deferral accuracy). Conversely, both Action-Only and PSC achieve 91.7% typed deferral accuracy by surfacing the categorical ontology in the prompt. Targeted ablations confirm that removing the support-sufficiency dimension selectively degrades REQUEST SUPPORT accuracy, while removing the evidence-sufficiency dimension triggers systematic overcommitment on unsupported items. Because DPAA operates within a single context window, these results represent upper-bound capability estimates; nonetheless, the structural findings indicate that frontier models possess strong latent triage capabilities that require explicit categorical decision paths to activate safely.

</details>


### [487] [Know When to Trust the Skill: Delayed Appraisal and Epistemic Vigilance for Single-Agent LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16753)
*Eren Unlu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MESA-S框架通过元认知控制机制解决LLM代理中的上下文污染和过度思考问题，将标量置信度估计转为向量（自我置信度vs源置信度），引入延迟程序探测和元认知技能卡，提升单代理编排的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型转变为集成广泛工具生态系统的自主代理，传统路由启发式方法面临上下文污染和"过度思考"问题。瓶颈不在于算法能力或技能多样性不足，而在于缺乏有纪律的二阶元认知治理。

Method: 提出MESA-S（元认知技能代理-单代理）框架，将标量置信度估计转为向量分离自我置信度（参数确定性）和源置信度（对外部检索过程的信任）。通过形式化延迟程序探测机制和引入元认知技能卡，将技能效用意识与其令牌密集型执行解耦。

Result: 在通过Gemini 3.1 Pro原生执行的上下文静态基准评估中，早期结果表明：显式编程信任来源和延迟升级能缓解供应链漏洞、修剪不必要的推理循环、防止卸载引起的置信度膨胀。

Conclusion: 该架构为可靠、具有认知警惕性的单代理编排提供了一个科学谨慎、行为锚定的步骤，通过元认知控制机制提升自主代理的决策质量。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) transition into autonomous agents integrated with extensive tool ecosystems, traditional routing heuristics increasingly succumb to context pollution and "overthinking". We argue that the bottleneck is not a deficit in algorithmic capability or skill diversity, but the absence of disciplined second-order metacognitive governance. In this paper, our scientific contribution focuses on the computational translation of human cognitive control - specifically, delayed appraisal, epistemic vigilance, and region-of-proximal offloading - into a single-agent architecture. We introduce MESA-S (Metacognitive Skills for Agents, Single-agent), a preliminary framework that shifts scalar confidence estimation into a vector separating self-confidence (parametric certainty) from source-confidence (trust in retrieved external procedures). By formalizing a delayed procedural probe mechanism and introducing Metacognitive Skill Cards, MESA-S decouples the awareness of a skill's utility from its token-intensive execution. Evaluated under an In-Context Static Benchmark Evaluation natively executed via Gemini 3.1 Pro, our early results suggest that explicitly programming trust provenance and delayed escalation mitigates supply-chain vulnerabilities, prunes unnecessary reasoning loops, and prevents offloading-induced confidence inflation. This architecture offers a scientifically cautious, behaviorally anchored step toward reliable, epistemically vigilant single-agent orchestration.

</details>


### [488] [Machine individuality: Separating genuine idiosyncrasy from response bias in large language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16755)
*Valentin Kriegmair,Dirk U. Wulff*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究使用交叉随机效应模型分析LLM的行为差异，发现16.9%的方差可归因于刺激特异性个体差异，表明LLM存在独特的"机器个体性"


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型在日常生活中日益普及，理解它们的行为倾向变得至关重要。现有方法无法区分行为差异是源于稳定的个体特性还是全局响应偏差和随机噪声。

Method: 应用交叉随机效应模型分析10个开源LLM对超过10万个单词在14个心理语言学规范上的7490万次评分，分离系统性效应。

Result: 平均16.9%的方差可归因于刺激特异性个体差异，显著超过统计零模型。跨规范预测分析显示这种个体性构成每个模型独特的连贯指纹。

Conclusion: LLM存在无法归因于响应偏差或随机噪声的个体差异，研究者称之为"机器个体性"。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into daily life, in roles ranging from high-stakes decision support to companionship, understanding their behavioral dispositions becomes critical. A growing literature uses psychometric inventories and cognitive paradigms to profile LLM dispositions. However, these approaches cannot determine whether behavioral differences reflect stable, stimulus-specific individuality or global response biases and stochastic noise. Here, we apply crossed random-effects models -- widely used in psychometrics to separate systematic effects -- to 74.9 million ratings provided by 10 open-weight LLMs for over 100,000 words across 14 psycholinguistic norms. On average, 16.9% of variance is attributable to stimulus-specific individuality, robustly exceeding a statistical null model. Cross-norm prediction analyses reveal this individuality as a coherent fingerprint, unique to each model. These results identify individual differences among LLMs that cannot be attributed to response biases or stochastic noise. We term these differences machine individuality.

</details>


### [489] [SAVE: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Condition Single-Cell Generation with Gene Block Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16776)
*Jiahao Li,Jiayi Dong,Peng Ye,Xiaochi Zhou,Haohai Lu,Fei Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SAVE是一个基于条件Transformer的单细胞基因表达统一生成框架，通过将语义相关基因分组为块来捕捉高阶依赖关系，在条件生成、批次效应校正和扰动预测等任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常将基因视为独立标记，忽略了它们之间的高层次生物学关系，导致性能不佳。需要一种能够跨多样生物和技术条件建模单细胞基因表达的方法，以表征细胞状态并模拟未见场景。

Method: SAVE采用条件Transformer框架，通过将语义相关基因分组为块来创建粗粒度表示，捕捉基因模块间的高阶依赖关系。结合流匹配机制和条件掩码策略，增强灵活模拟能力并推广到未见条件组合。

Result: SAVE在条件生成、批次效应校正和扰动预测等一系列基准测试中始终优于最先进方法，在生成保真度和外推泛化方面表现优异，特别是在低资源或组合性保留设置下。

Conclusion: SAVE为建模复杂单细胞数据提供了一个可扩展且可泛化的解决方案，在虚拟细胞合成和生物学解释方面具有广泛实用性。

Abstract: Modeling single-cell gene expression across diverse biological and technical conditions is crucial for characterizing cellular states and simulating unseen scenarios. Existing methods often treat genes as independent tokens, overlooking their high-level biological relationships and leading to poor performance. We introduce SAVE, a unified generative framework based on conditional Transformers for multi-condition single-cell modeling. SAVE leverages a coarse-grained representation by grouping semantically related genes into blocks, capturing higher-order dependencies among gene modules. A Flow Matching mechanism and condition-masking strategy further enhance flexible simulation and enable generalization to unseen condition combinations. We evaluate SAVE on a range of benchmarks, including conditional generation, batch effect correction, and perturbation prediction. SAVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generation fidelity and extrapolative generalization, especially in low-resource or combinatorially held-out settings. Overall, SAVE offers a scalable and generalizable solution for modeling complex single-cell data, with broad utility in virtual cell synthesis and biological interpretation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/fdu-wangfeilab/sc-save

</details>


### [490] [Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16812)
*Keshav Shenoy,Li Yang,Abhay Sheshadri,Sören Mindermann,Jack Lindsey,Sam Marks,Rowan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种可扩展的LLM审计方法：通过训练"内省适配器"使微调后的模型能够用自然语言描述其学习到的行为，即使这些行为被故意隐藏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当LLM被微调后，可能产生意外、有害或难以检测的行为。现有方法难以有效审计这些行为，需要一种能让模型自我描述其行为的可扩展方法。

Method: 首先从基础模型M微调出多个植入特定行为b_i的模型M_i，用这些(M_i, b_i)对作为训练数据。然后训练一个"内省适配器"——一个跨所有M_i模型联合训练的单一LoRA适配器，使这些模型能够用语言表达其植入的行为。

Result: 内省适配器能够泛化到不同方式训练的微调模型，在AuditBench上达到最先进的性能，能识别明确隐藏的有害行为，并能检测加密的微调API攻击。方法随模型规模和训练数据多样性的增加而表现更好。

Conclusion: 内省适配器是一种可扩展、有效且实用的微调LLM审计方法，能够使模型自我描述其学习到的行为，为LLM安全审计提供了新途径。

Abstract: When model developers or users fine-tune an LLM, this can induce behaviors that are unexpected, deliberately harmful, or hard to detect. It would be far easier to audit LLMs if they could simply describe their behaviors in natural language. Here, we study a scalable approach to rapidly identify learned behaviors of many LLMs derived from a shared base LLM. Given a model $M$, our method works by finetuning models $M_i$ from $M$ with implanted behaviors $b_i$; the $(M_i, b_i)$ pairs serve as labeled training data. We then train an \emph{introspection adapter} (IA): a single LoRA adapter jointly trained across the finetunes $M_i$ to cause them to verbalize their implanted behaviors. We find that this IA induces self-description of learned behaviors even in finetunes of $M$ that were trained in very different ways from the $M_i$. For example, IAs generalize to AuditBench, achieving state-of-the-art at identifying explicitly hidden concerning behaviors. IAs can also be used to detect encrypted finetuning API attacks.
